name: Gavin Newsom
subject: We’re doing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
This election will not be easy. It will be expensive.

**We're doing this.**
This November, California voters will have a chance to fight back against Trump's efforts to rig the election by voting on new congressional district maps in response to what Texas is doing.
This election will not be easy. It will be expensive. It will be close. And we will only win if everyone understands they have a role to play in this fight.
If that's all you need to hear, **please make a contribution to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California this November:**
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/california-redistricting**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250816-3&refcode2=2458_4767699_jd6t9P&akid=2458%2E4767699%2Ejd6t9P)
I've long supported independent redistricting. I can't stand these gerrymandered districts.But Democrats can't just sit there and act holier than thou while we watch our democracy be totally degraded.
Democrats try to play by a higher value system, but it's a different day. So if Greg Abbott and Donald Trump want to find five seats in Texas, then the blue state of California is going to get darker blue.
**So I am asking you to donate to help us win.**
$3 to help California neutralize Texas' redistricting.
$3 to send a message to Donald Trump and the Republican Party that we will now allow their attacks on our democracy.
$3 to make sure Trump can't rig the election to prevent Americans from electing a Democratic House of Representatives.
[**Please use this link to contribute $3 or whatever you can afford today. We are looking for a huge number of donations today as we launch this campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250816-3&refcode2=2458_4767699_jd6t9P&akid=2458%2E4767699%2Ejd6t9P)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

They think this will make us abandon President Trump.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztibboqvjhca7hvh4dbg7d3a09u2f7u6jo3en4kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z522k6lohrpkq0oesl76vk8musuainl9pg87ibgg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmi9brrp0kjg25djm5sjhefn4t35k601k56h8o6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4d0cc5q429pmj7mejbsm4uqfc96jrgkf4h546no_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf4uq1n2e1n53oet0euc7vsap811vev1sgg1844g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zokl0eoiie86mco6jms4095heetd9k4bi8fpgugg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg5qgf9f6alifh720lc19odre7uhv3o70ef0ce1g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkesvh66j0dnntp58i5fep6nhjjvsb7lla3rhhug_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zedh6a7bj8kqf55oind26kn5la6fmdo6bo7guo90_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)
---

name: Dinesh =?UTF-8?Q?D=E2=80=99Souza?=
subject: I need you to know something very important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas
body:
I’ve prepared a brief note that I need you to read

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsbuoq71ctmg2dlmnnmq2hpa7tus6dmsi0c79j9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)
---
Friend - it’s Dinesh D’Souza. I spent time writing you this urgent note. There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. _**[But I’m humbly asking that you take just a few minutes to read until the end!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7asq1osgf4an0696rdtri9h4ne70s280grt9dpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)**_ _The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY._ Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. **Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda.** **Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. ** _Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now._ **You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. ** **I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.**_**My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again.**_ Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to **_cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump_** and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me **_EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election_** , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. **That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself.** _Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything._ At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! **America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY!** _**_[I’m asking you, if you do anything today, please consider rushing an immediate contribution today to help us to fight back against this TYRANNY and continue to stand for the TRUTH!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs9b3q3li9pq3mv09qur3mbsndpdq1vc96t3odb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)_**_ **_And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is._** For America,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zr0ff62g38fj1v11n4qqdim50kem46fcofk3fooo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h62o71cph2bs)
---
Dinesh D’Souza
---
|

There’s a lot that needs to be said, so this message may be longer than usual. The radical left has made it their sole mission to blow up the entire MAGA movement and drag America into TYRANNY. Whether it’s the deep state working behind the scenes, federal district judges employing lawfare, or Democrat elected officials calling for BLOOD to be spilled in the streets in resistance against ICE, they’ll stop at nothing to tear our country apart and use every power afforded to them to BLOCK the plan President Trump has promised to deliver. Even after the recent SCOTUS ruling struck down nationwide injunctions, an activist judge has launched an attack, this time not against Pres. Trump, but instead in an attempt to BLOCK Congress from being able to make critical funding cuts that prevent your hard-earned tax dollars from being funneled to the WOKE agenda. Democrats are now even inspiring domestic terrorism against ICE, inciting deranged lunatics in the streets and telling them they must be willing to get SHOT. Look, I’ve been called a fascist, a conspiracy theorist and been mercilessly attacked for fighting for the truth. It’s never stopped me before and it won’t stop me now. You see, I’m also an immigrant. I came to America with nothing. And I believe in doing everything we can to save this country from insanity. I’m not afraid to stand up for it no matter what the cost. I say all this because today I want to tell you about another fearless warrior for the truth.My son-in-law, Rep. Brandon Gill has been smeared by the radical left again and again. Years ago, Brandon started one of President Trump’s TRUSTED NEWS OUTLETS, the DC Enquirer to cancel out the FAKE NEWS smear campaigns against Trump and give a real voice to the American people. To every rancher, every farmer, every small business owner, every worker who built this country with their bare hands. Then, Brandon helped me EXPOSE the STOLEN 2020 election , working on my film “2000 Mules.” While the fake news media refused to report the truth, we made sure millions of Americans knew what really happened. That’s why Brandon and I are two of the mainstream media’s biggest enemies. They DESPISE everything we fight for because they DESPISE the truth itself. Brandon is my son-in-law. But I know him to be much more than that. He is a true conservative WARRIOR who has proven again and again he will never back down from anything. At this moment, he’s fighting tooth and nail to permanently codify DOGE cuts & he’s willing to take a stand against any activist judge that gets in his way! America needs conservative warriors who are unafraid and unwavering in their mission to wage war on the forces that seek to reduce America to TYRANNY! And with the current state of our country, I can’t stress enough how crucial your generous support is. For America, Dinesh D’Souza | | | Paid for by Brandon Gill for Texas | | | Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are You Facing a Giant You Can’t Defeat Alone?
body:
Have you ever sensed that something is missing—something deeper, stronger, unshakable?

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj43hharj66nbvoddd76o81c71jsra2ngna62vto_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h6apr2cph2bs)
---
Hello Friend, Have you ever sensed that something is missing—something deeper, stronger, unshakable? For over 40 years, I’ve served as a pastor, and I’ve spoken with thousands of people—many of whom feel like they’re losing ground in a world growing darker by the day. They want to stand strong, but discouragement, fear, and confusion leave them feeling defeated. That’s why I wrote [_Invincible_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zofqb5o6ch7nok5ega5jk1uv3c9g24ogbm40jsjo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h6apr2cph2bs)—to help people like you experience spiritual victory over the very giants that seek to steal your peace and joy. When you give a generous gift to support _Pathway to Victory_ , I’ll send you this book as my thank-you. You’ll discover how to conquer fear, overcome discouragement, and experience the power of God in your everyday life. Your gift helps us proclaim the truth of Scripture through radio, television, and digital media across the globe—including prisons, unreached nations, and homes just like yours. Make your gift today and request your copy of _Invincible_ :
[https://secure.ptv.org/invincible-generous-kit-1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7toa0cnf1gqkv928p4s45810ra2sdvulh6jhhtg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h6apr2cph2bs) Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zappa0spcmmq67iogdvmci290fdj3atubsvaqu18_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6c1h2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9iukp6bblgne39oev5uinb9nh96o71586gtj9hg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6c1h2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsl4itosl6s6k6r67ee4hltgd775ej6lvca9mmj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6c1h2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. name: James O'Keefe
subject: Not today, Satan
body:
I hope you can take a moment to read, in full, this letter to you. It’s from the heart and important to me. This has been the most draining and emotionally challenging ordeal of my life.

| [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc5n3d8qpr5cssjl710op2qfr5l39t9jp5u3thdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6cdh2bs)
[****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z83183g20vmv2i0a4vqifq6q7kfde7bp78sjb3mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

I hope you can take a moment to read, in full, this letter to you. **It 's from the heart and important to me. **

This has been the most draining and emotionally challenging ordeal of my life.

**When I started Project Veritas, my intent was pure and remains so**. I wanted to expose the corruption and hypocrisy in our society and governments.

I wanted to give you a glimpse behind the curtain by presenting raw video footage of what goes on behind closed doors.

And I did it, time and time again. **I'll continue to do so until my last breath.**

But the people I trusted at Project Veritas turned on me. They effectively terminated me, and when that wasn't enough, they sued me to stop me from doing the work that fires my heart.

That lawsuit continues today; it's a massive burden, but it's part of my mission to tell the truth, and **I need your help to keep fighting to bring the darkness to light**. [** Will you donate today to my legal defense fund?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6a040k5vsa4jv916pgdejc9d3tgisan92m8f7a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6cdh2bs)

Our bills continue to grow, and as we near trial, [**I can't do it without your help**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1i2gedp81f79965jkjt1mjpjg83g0svmpv5umg8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6cdh2bs).

But we will win, and you will know the truth and be able to see for yourself who was behind the destruction of the organization I poured my heart and soul into.

[**Your support means I can keep fighting to expose the truth**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhc6a557q1fhgftome7m5sguf6r0gieofk6alapo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6cdh2bs) that's locked behind closed doors.

Almost a year ago today, I filed a counterclaim against Project Veritas. That gave me the ability to pursue justice rather than sit on the defense.

The ongoing case is all about that. It's not only about justice, but also about gathering facts through discovery, depositions, and our eventual trial.

While I can't share those facts right now, [**with your help, the truth will come out**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z53kgmholulru4187p4cm5h30q9548onmce90nl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6cdh2bs).

My parents taught me to see the world in binary colors, black and white, good and bad. Over my years of work, **I've come to realize that the more good that you do, the more the devil will try to stop you.**

From this lawsuit to countless others, from being locked up as a young man on false charges, to having the FBI raid my home in the early morning hours**, the devil has tried to break my spirit, kill my will, and discourage me from doing the good that's a result of my passion.**

And during all of those trials, **people like you have stood by me**. Good people who choose to stand by me and smile in the face of evil and say, "**not today, satan . . . not today**."

[**Your support not only helps me keep going**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6ss9e4tcmuu0n3su47o1briis0jcuimqejtvhuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6cdh2bs), but it gives me hope that **darkness will never overtake the light as long as there are people like us still breathing.**

So thank you. Sincerely, thank you.

[**Please donate today and help me keep this fight going, sending a message that good still exists in this world**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqu22ioajcs6m9tvv4mrrt4e7ulj7p563id2u7og_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6cdh2bs).

Thank you for all that you do.

In truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcagn4oodkc6vk4av9n6mjteik4323jac0ccgmgo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgm1oj7c5ge48d245p25oh4ctimaob2c3gmcor24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjm4cmq4lqthrkghr4ke5tc84t9dfgeshmo6s87g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h61ob6cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2mij1giln0dcpole5glk1iev5aor004quif7ajo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr5clgm4o71cphm49fg)

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhdd2ifrl99c8503oe07h41v2pskvva5kkjfviu0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cdh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd5ja99dlqko8k39mgfbcaa3h8f5vpopf43s4ang_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cdh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2958jj8vponjreg8eltaqtdej6ab67giloc9240_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cdh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zafekav7tvfb2me6pvl8mh8mu3bf0dqqqdes26s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cdh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---
|
---

---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp96imsjp9og49169sqkdi715pncuu2epscclji8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cjh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeotiu7pifddalfaj3rf741fcesdgvef16iibrdg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cjh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7c8hclaave02icpabn84uvl7k23iqs5l2a4e3t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cjh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpvar5cn338fskgjniu6lppt4h0agddeeg4c3em0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cjh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpduc2p01jumjisoj9tcnhtjfmh775i5aehdla8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cjh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjom3tu16b0fh7v55b2qvhjr2580um3qhegkgp18_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cjh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp1ot8727b38tdjjbjcatgiq56g88epckeu88spo_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cjh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztb9s1hfjg2p2mk8nqv1c4k9dvejb181phsc5ilg_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5h69pj2cjh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

name: Byron Donalds
subject: This can’t wait any longer.
body:
I won’t back down. I won’t fold. I won’t sell out.

---
| | | | | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztsl1kji2tou5s7hbm57bcr7dg9ihotj84f2fbag_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5j64o36cdh2bs)
---
| | This can't wait.

This is Trump-endorsed, battle-tested MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds -- and the Radical Left has declared WAR on my campaign for Governor of Florida.

>From the moment I announced I was running for Governor of Florida the Democrats have been relentless in their _**[attacks against me.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zna8rlbo8n1m0nc72ontdc8luems8afril17b9g0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5j64o36cdh2bs "attacks against me.")**_

They've teamed up with their buddies in the Fake News, launching _NATIONAL smear campaigns_ , hit pieces, and relentless lies to destroy my reputation.

_But they aren 't just attacking me. They are attacking my family, my friends, my allies, and the MAGA movement._

The same Democrats who wasted **$45 MILLION** trying to flip Florida Blue are gearing up to dump MILLIONS MORE to crush this campaign. They're BEGGING me to back down and surrender.

But let me make this clear: I won't back down. I won't fold. I won't sell out.

_Thankfully President Trump chose me for a reason_. I'm a fighter, period. With every attack from the Left I become stronger and more determined to maintain the American First way of life for Florida.

So will you please stand with me by chipping in _**[$20.25, $50, or $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zugf44dsddb2okt0bb36j0liuugvu920v5gj1gb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5j64o36cdh2bs "$20.25, $50, or $100")**_ to help me become Florida's next governor? With your help, we'll send a clear message to the Radical Left that we won't be intimidated.
---
| | | | | [CHIP IN HERE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcgdm5qcmfne3sg2frforitnj18bceaogad2j620_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5j64o36cdh2bs)
---
I'm proud to stand with you, President Trump, and the entire MAGA Movement. We've faced tough fights before -- and together, we'll win this one too.
---
| | [CHIP IN HERE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7mnv2s0f52qaki3drs5peik137ef57npkok774g_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5j64o36cdh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless,

Byron

name: Patriot Alerts
subject: The Anti-American movement against President Trump just took a turn for the worse.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOD, FAMILY, COUNTRY PAC
body:
Things just got hostile outside of the White House.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkldu9tbmt7atja6rb3vksf12pm8e7903vd59s08_rp22sh2s8i6epb5c5j64p74c1h2bs)
---

The Anti-American movement against President Trump just took a turn for the worse.
Protesters lined the streets outside of the Oval Office to make violent threats against President Trump.
**\- They threatened his life.****\- They threatened his agenda.****\- They threatened every last Trump supporter.**
They think this will make us abandon President Trump.
**BUT WE’LL NEVER ABANDON TRUMP!**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: AIPAC is attacking me
body:
God commands me to walk in truth

| | | | |
---
Friend, the floodgates have opened.
I’m officially under attack from AIPAC for saying **"the most truthful and easiest thing to say that Oct 7th in Israel was horrific and all hostages must be returned, but so is the genocide, humanitarian crisis, and starvation happening in Gaza".**
The genocide, humanitarian crisis, and starvation in Gaza aren’t political issues for me, they are issues of my Christian faith. **God commands me to walk in truth and love.**
He commands me to walk in truth of the Gospel, that Jesus was fully divine and fully human, died for our sins, and was resurrected in victory over death.
He also commands me to walk in love, by obeying His commandments, including to love one another.
What is happening in Gaza is a violation of God’s commandments and a travesty of humanity, and I refuse to bear false witness for my own political benefit. What is political about this is that AIPAC is going to bring their immense power to bear against me.
**_[I’m one of the only members of Congress that doesn’t take money from AIPAC and who never has](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08d/?__vbtrk=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08d/?__vbtrk=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I don’t think it’s right. The truth is AIPAC needs to register as a foreign lobbyist by U.S. law because they are representing the __secular government__ of nuclear armed Israel 100%!!!
Look at what just happened, as soon as Congress was let out on recess and supposed to be working in our districts, AIPAC just took a bunch of members of Congress to Israel to make sure they don’t step out of line.
**While AIPAC is lying to their donors about me claiming I’m "betraying my American values" the REALITY is AIPAC serves and lobbies for a foreign country, Israel!!**
Patriot, I’m as AMERICAN as they come!
**_[I can’t be bought and I’m not backing down](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08d/?__vbtrk=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_!!**
I’m fighting for my children’s generation and for AMERICA ONLY!!!!
_If AIPAC has a problem with that, I have one message for them:_
**[BRING. IT. ON.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08d/?__vbtrk=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
I’ve always had the support of the conservative grassroots in my fight to force Washington to put America First, and now I’m up against the most powerful lobby in the history of our country.
**_[If you’ve been waiting to donate until something really important happened, now is the time to get back into the fight](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08d/?__vbtrk=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I will need it when they unleash their war chest in my primary.
_For AMERICA,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08d/?__vbtrk=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b08d/?__vbtrk=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

### **_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b07G/?__vbtrk=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExODIxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=311821&trkid=855289876&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

If AIPAC has a problem with that, I have one message for them: I’ve always had the support of the conservative grassroots in my fight to force Washington to put America First, and now I’m up against the most powerful lobby in the history of our country. . I will need it when they unleash their war chest in my primary. For AMERICA, Marjorie Taylor Greene | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

President Trump said on Saturday that Ukraine should [make a deal to end the war with Russia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGyoyAQxvHT4A4LWgi6YDEbd5ltllZHWsMMgoVtUrn9q-QK7wJfff_f7TpdMaaY17-4keelTJleRyJmqhPXc9tfmPnYCWc61xTp4FDWCRRYqXqp3RQwpvdkmuAXIqCuIa-dtQYsADQPrx3ZS9cFmLXrnLnDgDAHs8y9HYzGron-s6Z67bRSTun23oegeguDBRxmQGEUhciltv9KzPygJb3Lk2o7l61J_sG8H6L7I2AUMIYzv_HT0PJTwEhZwHgrNQUB46DU0Bn5zZIYys6H3E-O-ZB7pYUq5ZnkUqqs5WSSXOT5v2LMJL8AEhemKjcijk31YX_FlOJxccKodcOYvo_4V4xPDz8BAAD__wA3iKY) because _"Russia is a very big power, and they're not.”_

# Sunday, August 17, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1978, [The Double Eagle II](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1urDAURldjukHm-o8pXLynaJRm0kZKYxl8AUcGI7iMxe4jsoW03_l0ivP5dE8fU1zGDz-jpSG7BcuekAg3R9sxr8UvtK_oezzGFHGnkEcHHNSNt7fGuOBjOp2sgh0QAUWFtjFKSVAAUE1WC9XJRvO75LrXDeem7fS9B49dgMFAFe1l421jLsibumtD4K2CuwJ_HZnkGCLlrf7OcaEJh3TmF251n-cq2Ylo3Zn4x-DB4FFKqc980NHhxa_FUz8x8Xgx8fauvoZM_80hxmqzYS0xpbhrwyQfZx_Tr5L-1OFl4ScAAP__x1BwyA), piloted by Americans Ben Abruzzo, Maxie Anderson, and Larry Newman, made history as the first balloon to successfully fly across the Atlantic Ocean, landing near Paris 137 hours after taking off from Presque Isle, Maine. Fall is still weeks away, but today's _Quick Hits_ section features a variety of [soup recipes perfect for sweater weather](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb8GOkf2xAancPEaurx2S-TgAWZlbGQPQfz9KvsL219dnXO-nuPTU6S0_PcbOp7zmPCsEZmxjFyObT994rqjn_BYImHlkJcRJBghrVD9GDzFa9RtcDMi4L1Fp3pjNBgAaFdnzfyCIDuvYFLG6oeyuutD99K9t1rOLbnPm7SqV1L2Ut1eNgRpDTwM-McEvtESA3Eut-9MiVec45XfWG5T3troVua9Nvd_DQwNDLzimlM-Sr0q4_bZNDAoK2o-dlFwoh2rmHMR54pJXPkQH0NR84a8UlpEpW2PKHwKonqmOl-UlgaGtriwnxQj1a5vtFw2T_GXgf8U7u3gJwAA__9fvoSd). **Correction:** Yesterday's edition incorrectly stated the Chesapeake Bay Bridge-Tunnel was in Maryland. It's in Virginia. Today's sponsor is **[COR OneTM](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj7GOqzAQAL_G7hLZC8amcPEaurz2SmvBC_hkMDKboPz9KfcLV49mpPl6hAemnPblP27keS5hp-vMxEw1cH1ux4U7nwfhRM8lJzo5liWAAnNT7qZtiJjyO7Qy-pkIqJHktTWmBQMAcvUGe2N178ZGjRHnHscujg5VbDs9Ic4y-U9NOW21Ulbp--hiVM5AbwD7CVC0imLiUu_fJe280pzf5UX1PpVNZr8yH6do_gkYBAxTqSth5vVDBQyy-nhcKed0dla0atkw5V-T_7T78vATAAD__2kJacM),** the first at-home device that measures acute, chronic, and low-grade inflammation from a single drop of blood, giving you fast, lab-accurate results to take control of your health.

## Trump Pushes For Russia-Ukraine Peace Deal
President Trump said on Saturday that Ukraine should [make a deal to end the war with Russia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2Ko1AQRp9GdxWuFY26cBEYXMzQs52lVHtLU933R-4tI3n7wbxC7w4c-OB8_z6mDxInYf1Lngdd4hT4yI5VOU2adr8dFDRvTDPvqxPOauM6ocEGTAdVO1kS95rq0g4LM_K15KFqm6bGBhHLx0CfXd8aMtYuy627moV6vlW3a084267mUoZzzXRVWxnTmury2Vlrugb7BqmfkYrasBWN6fIVJeiDF_eKT06XOfrSDQ_VLRfXe4FjgeNxHBefw-kKHDnAngsct-hEZT5RgnIKpBIDOUjs3niady5kemXYvxNJYFijKoGnbwYCy-SAFuUEefdeFA7RB2y7SoCXsLMZQoSZKfMiiQscKcH9Xv35ZX9_lWmw2yHOSb61RW1WT-LeCfqj358D_g8AAP__sr2bvA) because _"Russia is a very big power, and they're not. "_ The President's remarks come after Russian President Vladimir Putin told Trump during Friday's Alaska summit that he would end the war in Ukraine [if Ukraine surrenders the Donetsk region](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkc2qnEAQRp-m3dXQljqOCxeTBAmEm2VCVlJjl07n9o90l1fM0wfnFe76wAfnfL_fxjeyzoblJ3nuZY5j4D07FuE0Str8ulOQvDJNvC3OchYTlxE1NqBvULajIeuOsS5MPzMjVwX3Zds0NTaIWDz7qb1eTdfho3vMuuJyqjtG3ZTtlbrZcFvY_lzTt7IttW51eXncjNG3BrsGqZuQVK3ZWInp8jfaIE-e3RE_OF2m6AvXP0XWrKq7wkHhsO_7xedwMoUDB9iywuGUOmFMzigctvdENjBk-MeOQ34_DpAInlngJQ0xgI_B0AE0CyfYMqQtZ0uQN--tQOZpS2wgRHjFAVoSs-cgCgdKcL-XP77-oe-qGuJkjaq-fTkr855_cVqL1Jt1t87ZfG1VrRdP1r185FMnfPT4PwAA__-XW58n) to Russia. Trump has reportedly committed in principle to [providing "security guarantees"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAQBeDTmMwtu5rfwMEmZL3phqjAZfCOsZFddIvbj5grTFylT--9f6_phT74uP7FnQy7NEX6lEDMlCfO5358MHI5CBc61-CpsE3rBAoaqXqpu8miD9dUV9Y4IqBnRUZ3TVNDAwDVZnDAZXFD3WvQ1OiZasR27obF1s5B6ypvbk31utNKdUo_5t5a1TcwNIDDAihqRdZzyo__yUfeyIUrvSk_lrRXwWzMRxHPPwJGAWO8jlT4PgkYb1jAqHoBo24FjGeRd7_7DznJwlcgWWg5s-dL7iefGKQlR7GQtIRBpih5I8k4B5IuZXl-ZfSRZKYjZb6pKht7fHwIvrSdqNW6ow8_4fhXi74NfAcAAP__FJmL-Q) to Ukraine to safeguard its frontier from Russia following a possible peace deal. Ukrainian President [Volodymyr Zelensky will meet with President Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDEOnDAQRU9jOiN7wMAWLtLQbdqUyOABnDU2smfXIqeP2CIXSPf1Rxr99349p6dx3oXtpzlQ0xqngCV7JMI0UXofZzGB8olmwffmHWaycZtAgOJi4LKfrHH-mtrK6hURsKlQy16pFhQAVLuWViK0TbeKzki0D5jnrledMKKRVsyqcvr-JgbZSyF6Iet5sFYMCh4KzGMBw1qB1lFM9e_oAu24-it-MNVLPCqvd6Izs-YHg5HBWEqp3_mGuM8MxjvefUzeMhhNIrd4vKt_EB2D8Q96DPnlLk6RUzIf9HcqJu8ubBQDj4EfMVhz8TUmTsa_Mi-Odv7VVCVtz-K8d7nrWSu2wzj_XUj_pfWj4W8AAAD__2IRjdY) on Monday at the White House. European leaders, who could be part of a Ukraine security pledge, have also been invited to Monday's meeting.
## D.C. Police Chief to Remain in Control
The Trump administration [agreed to keep the Washington, D.C.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb2OnEAMgJ9m6LwaDCxsQUEU0USXJkVKNDtjwMn8oBnvkXv7iFPeIJ0l6_ukz_75trwZ9hy37ybQKGtaIp3FkwjlRfIrHKeJUg4yll6bZyri0ragxg70AHW_OMP-Y2krN65ESE1FY913XYsdIlb7qO3QNb11-rGuQ1ffH0Nb37W7NzT0z27tKx4vmx7qvta61_XtOTinhw4fHZqHRaNaTY4l5duvxFF2Wv1Heqd8sylUftxFjqKaSeGscD7P8xZKvHYKZ4rwKgrnI3kWtte4XWgMFEXh_FkIxgWOXCQb4RTBbJmogCT4TXSAs3DhlsDuTCtwhMMbS_B8CZwsO3AIvP2DKa4pW7r8kLKjrHA2Gaap_jZN-Ec1c7LsVPP1y3V0OssPykeVR3ec7D2Xe69avQXD_jNP_usn7yP-DQAA___OV6SH) police chief in control of the Metropolitan Police Department, a day after Attorney General Pam Bondi said Drug Enforcement Administration Chief Terry Cole would take over. Instead, Cole [will serve as a "designee"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGvozAQhH-N6UD22o5N4eKkE11O112JHHshezIYwSZR_v0TKV_7ytEnjeabf9fxGqnQOv-JCwae6rji6yjIjPvI-2PZXnHlY8OY8DEXwoNznUeQYFvpW-XGHKm8R9PkMCEC6gaDctYasADQ3EPS1nhvLzDlbHrj_ORQKtk77VOWRjcUzjbplVNSOqm6m89Zegu9hdgniMJIzMR17_5XWvmOU3nXJ-5dqktTwp15O4T-JWAQMMRbOg26uZ5YwPC3FmJKh4Ch0BPbx5Yj4xk_em3MC63tNyT0QFno3wqM1RaUbvaQtxeVQsfFCSPnJVL5DOAfvfYM8BUAAP__CoZ_vA) tasked with directing D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser to provide any services the federal government may need to enforce federal law in the District. Bondi also indicated the administration would continue to pressure D.C. leaders to help federal authorities aggressively pursue immigrants in the country illegally. The administration [walked back the takeover effort](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdI7MYoNTuLiGLtdeiRx7gb0zGNmboLz9ibzCX48038z35zE9PCXal99-Q8dznnY8a0JmLBOX13acfud6oA_4WhJh5ZiXCRQYqaxshyl6Sp9JN9HNiIBdg64djNFgAKBZXT_bAH3soTcGjbFdZ42eQ6fvNnY6xobc1aZsO7RKDaq9PW2Myhq4G_D3AF5ohZE4l9vfTDuvOKdPfmO5hbw1ya3MRxXdLwGjgJFXXCmlKxMwrnnD65CAsbJnlKfnsAoYjf5OkdurECb5zGfFImOQBStF3LnKGSMWn-SREwWU7P_hRRUwNsXF46SUqPaD0GrZPH2JDf9I4dvB_wAAAP__kt6GfA) after a lawsuit brought by D.C. Attorney General Brian Schwalb.
## Library Book Returned After 82 Years
A book was returned to the [San Antonio Public Library](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunDAQRb_GdEb2gBcoXBA90UQvipQiJRrwwDoxNrLNEv4-Yn_hdTMazdG95_fn-InWWb_-wI10XsLo6UyOcqY45nhs-4k-p51wpmN1llI2YR1BgOKi5bIZDVp3jXVh9EIEVBWkZaNUDQoAiqfGR6Nm1cpJzHUtFSp6dN3UVdgtsjbQFVbfNNHKRgrRCFlOrTGiVdApwG4GZLUgY3OI5Z9gfX7S4q7woljOYSucfua8J1b1DAYGw3me5Zb8fWMwkOdHYjDcpRgM79mF8Jff_-YgPt1LpHxET4bnwDP9w8SdnSLGi-OSKXJPGN3FW-AXYbwZGHnfy-_9x09k1RBma1j18e3WSGf6RXEvojb7aZ2z6dGwWqwbWvcOnL9k-aXhfwAAAP__qcGSTg) nearly 82 years late with a note hoping there was no fee, adding, "_Grandma won 't be able to pay it anymore_." The book, _Your Child, His Family, and Friends,_ was checked out in July 1943 and returned in June by a person in Oregon after sorting through boxes from a deceased parent. The library was able to give the family some good news. [It ended overdue fines](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGunTAQRL8GukVmwc-4cJGG7qZNiRa8cJ0YG9nmIv4-IsofvO5II41mzq_X9CLnXdh-0s6mrHEKfGXPpXCaSjr346JQ8sG08Ll5x7nYuE0oUIIYoFWTJefvqa-tWZmRu5pNq6TsUSJi_TaiVb3udacJSaql11IvSq66E2y_JMnamadNDK1qhVCibebBWjFI1BJJL0hVL9i6ElPzO7pQ3rz6O344NUvca2_epRy56n5UOFY4XtfVhHl5Xjx5heODFY5nhv_k3Zwo3TDH-AcSlzMFtjAg3EwpQ4iFIdOdYUsU7E5wxVCAZs9w0A0U7j0mhrQEQpQoZZ2MPS7nvctfqurFtpPz_9aVbyn9GPwbAAD__1UgjG8) in 2021, or the three-cent daily penalty would have totaled nearly $900.

**Whatever happened to 30-minute pizza delivery?** For 20 years, Domino's Pizza ran a famous marketing campaign promising to deliver your pizza in 30 minutes or the pizza would be free. It ended in 1993 and will likely never return. Why? In one word: [Lawsuits](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uhDAQQOHTmA5kD5ifwkUauk2bEs3aY3BiMMKzoN3TR5srpH7SV7yv23TDEMM2f-JKhn2aNrpyJGY6Jj4e637hxnkntPSYY6DMLs0TSNCl7EvVTQ5DfE5N4YwnAqoLMqrTugENAMVihjta7wfV3p3tNdZ1I63uUddDqwbn2yKYtyZ71SkpO6mqe--c7DUMGnCwgKKR5AKno_pOYeOFfHymk47KprWIZmHes6g_BIwCxuu6qrylnfI7Cxg9Wi7tQvZHwLg-8lKeR0pruYfXCwWMxWHcfoUYQ2470ch5xRD_aP7Xj9PAbwAAAP__e3B1Mw). A series of accidents linked the speedy delivery promise to dangerous driving and traffic accidents. The company faced multi-million-dollar legal judgments amid growing public concern over speeding pizza delivery drivers. Today, real-time tracking and quality have taken precedence over speed for food delivery. Companies like Uber Eats and DoorDash will give a general range of drop-off times, but no guarantee of high-speed delivery. Worth noting: Despite the change in the U.S., Domino's continues to offer 30-minute delivery in some international markets--with restrictions. _Did you ever get a Domino 's pizza in 30 minutes--or were they late and the pizza was free? Let us know by replying to this email._

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:
Governor Greg Abbott and U.S. Department of Agriculture Commissioner Brooke Rollins [announced](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVssuMYBDwyVKm-p1KpVR-sC1zEq_pAhIXn7yn2FrudIv-H_fRkuGGJYrm84k8mPcR0WKilSzrQPye1UyrrPMy3oKG3o6GHR_QzAoT1xfRJq8Bjic5CVN5b7TlRkhGpbCVp2upqMHR2Q5iC9wzM6CwrPyLV1VnUtEFTBHBjXQgnBRSNrO2oYhVetbhorOsskJx_yutd5okwPTGN8rnfaa7fOVTRTzltizQuDnkFfSqmf6y3fLB3_sWB2E2v6O2tet4_lPfZfl-4zVbvxWwkxhnRWTPLrjCH-kfl_Ie4GfgMAAP__vzFyuQ) on Friday plans to build a $750 million fly factory in South Texas to combat the spread of the New World Screwworm.

# Sunday, August 17, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1842, _The_ _Telegraph_ and _Texas Register_ mistakenly announced the death of [John Henry Moore](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uwyAYgOHT4M0Wf47xwNDFW7p2tD7M50DDTwQoJLev2iv0Au8rPV_X_Qo--HT7hIi6vc68J-w1YGtY9noU7D2XGDHBgfUBB74MHPedUz6PVI1s2S348N7lYLWhdmUDarbMs-RKrmpwWq4gJQhqOKxCHesi4cIYspkKeVFyHrz-jVHFFsYoE3Iyp-Ins8ushDBsNURStL7lMjWHDV9Qz_DOTyzTkeMQtGvtUYn4IHwjfOu9T606yCn4hFMuN8I3B8manO-Eb5ha8VgJ32LOBcfv7NLoMJX3ULR9dB-Cr5eFSHqL4MPfo_1P5qn5TwAAAP__kPF4cw), one of the Old Three Hundred settlers who received land grants as members of Stephen F. Austin’s first colony. Moore lived another 38 years. A new surfside park is coming to a Texas town, courtesy of Elon Musk's SpaceX. ## USDA Announces $750M Fly Factory Coming to Texas
Governor Greg Abbott and U.S. Secretary of Agriculture Brooke Rollins [announced](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVssuMYBDwyVKm-p1KpVR-sC1zEq_pAhIXn7yn2FrudIv-H_fRkuGGJYrm84k8mPcR0WKilSzrQPye1UyrrPMy3oKG3o6GHR_QzAoT1xfRJq8Bjic5CVN5b7TlRkhGpbCVp2upqMHR2Q5iC9wzM6CwrPyLV1VnUtEFTBHBjXQgnBRSNrO2oYhVetbhorOsskJx_yutd5okwPTGN8rnfaa7fOVTRTzltizQuDnkFfSqmf6y3fLB3_sWB2E2v6O2tet4_lPfZfl-4zVbvxWwkxhnRWTPLrjCH-kfl_Ie4GfgMAAP__vzFyuQ) on Friday plans to build a $750 million fly factory in South Texas to combat the spread of the New World screwworm. The new facility, located on Moore Air Base outside Edinburg, is set to begin releasing sterile male screwworm flies into the wild. The USDA also plans to deploy $100 million in technology, including fly traps, lures, and border security measures. The announcement follows steps taken in [June](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL0O2yAURp8Gb1iA__DA0IUtXTtaF7iOUTFYQELy9pU79AW6nuHTd86vx_YAH3x8_oQTVf3saYvYSsBaMW_FZmwt5fPECBbLBRY_BuzvTTAxUSYpXzYHPny3sXPKMLfyDhVfpmkUclxldyhkzEprQMJgxWid4QIQzez21c6LY51X9xiTfOGc8WHszS7Fzt0yyWEwfDVkZOh8TbmvB1b8QNnDN70x9zadXVBHrVchww8iNBG6tda_ioP-md5EaDDpVekNiNC3GhH6ylgKzRgQCt7gPkCEZjMRmksidEGbsUL-0pxC8LFQiDG9osVCTQqOXgEitek0UGnERlvKwdF_vQqNKdejQXa0XBnBdVm5q_kQfJkXMrLnCT78Faj_l_2txJ8AAAD__-Ymmxg) by the USDA amid reports that the parasites were pushing northward from Central America. The USDA has [estimated](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3O4yAUAE-DO1vwjGNcUGzjLttuafHziJ8WGwtISG6_2lzha6eYkebPfbsbinQ-fpsDdX2HtJ3YSsRaMW_FZWwt5ePA0zgsl3H4tsb93YDD1HPVi3nzhuJnk53XlvtFdKjFPE0SlFxUt-vFzcEHmKVwk1EAMCkO9uaRS2ulWjrS_2VciVkILkY52KAgCD9PahytWCyTHD3VlIe6Y8W3KSF-0gvz4NLRRb3XehU2_mKwMlhba4O5dirDs3gzPNKLwVqoYmGwegzmGSuDNVD8krOVfqdSUyZnYo8unekg19NxGVeHy4cua381ipHKbWaSPw5D8ZuuPxv20vAvAAD__3RcgWs) the potential cost of a screwworm outbreak to Texas' economy to be $1.8 billion.
## Ten Commandments Law Heard in Federal Court
A federal court in San Antonio on Friday heard arguments on Senate Bill 10, which [requires public schools to display](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGuozAQRb8GuolsAwEKim3o3rZborE9BO_aGHkmj-TvV-QXXnele3Wko_vna_nCEMP--I2JJnmtednp5EgiVBZ2hc4zl5RoR0d8oKOXRfdvMcp0oAbQ_eIxxPfS1n6yyo-6pkn3XdeaoR2Hept67xXqZuzXBq1Gq9p7czcdrtqpdVRjHaYLpgbda610097sOphV-74bmsbq0VatIh8kl5tsJPRCXuM7f1O5uZzqOG0iB1fNr8rMlZnRuh4TlhBjvgaVmS-jyswxO4yVmf8-_YNgIywMniwKMSDDhwzstpwjw4qO4MjMwUaChLtHIZAMPvAR8Q1CO7icribRLgwRT3D5WQQKxfAIeQemgwrKFd32LG4DFhSqy-SPM8QY-N5XrXokDPEjIz-74Hsy_wMAAP__xE-hFg) the Ten Commandments by Sept. 1. Four organizations sought an injunction on the grounds that the law violates the First Amendment's freedom-of-religion provision. A lawyer from Attorney General Ken Paxton's office argued for the law, saying it is a passive display, causes no injury, and [reflects the foundation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGOpTAQRE9jMiO7gcEEBJs4m003RI3dgLWNjWzP8P_tV8wVNqugVHpP9edz-cTAIe6_8aS5vra0RLoLU62Ul-Iy3XfK50kRHZULHb1WdH8XUDBIZaQeF4-B30vf-HlVftINzXochh5MP5nmmMfR49AZwgFGUqo367DR9DE5UBOimpowP2PK6FFrpbu-XTcDm_bjYLpu1dMqekU-1JTbelClF5aN3-mbcuvS2fB81HoV0f0SYAXY-77bI32VmuL1tXJwJ_mAbcq7AIu5BsdUBNhHU4DNxGEPKQqwD4YAq4wAq580gBmnSYDdyFNGli595SpDlAWjxFhTDEkehLlIpv0pHMhMcSdZk_xBlZWidOk8MfqTYi2yuCMllj6Ui_EtGW8Btsmzv-7AHMrHKHq1nxj4x6_-3yvfM_wLAAD__7Cxo14) of the American legal system. The parties will return virtually Monday to finish questioning witnesses and deliver closing arguments, with a decision expected before Sept. 1.
## List: Bolivar Gains National Ranking
Texas’ Bolivar Peninsula ranked [No. 10 on a list](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUQOHV2J0t_mzsguI16fLaKa1ruMRowERwJyS7HyVbmP7oK87XdbtCiOG8_YeEhp4-bye2GpEIy1ZtwdZySQlPsFjvYPG5g_3eBBPTwJaB681BiK9N9c7szK28R8P1NCmxqHXpDzNLDtJLJuw6cXQr837WkjMt1arsLPtg3hhbuOaccanG3S_Cc6enRcqdr3unGLpAuYx0IOETqo-v_MAy2pz6aA6ie-3kv05cOnFprY1HTkj5lt9BJy4_ZyB0QyUgrJ9KRthzGRy8BirwwNgX4-4txBjqrDvFbglC_Pj0tysPI34DAAD__6LZdqg) of the nation’s best Labor Day weekend vacation spots, according to a new study. Researchers analyzed traveler search patterns to identify top Labor Day destinations, spanning coasts, lakes, and inland cities, with a mix of classic escapes and emerging hotspots. The new facility, located on Moore Air Base outside Edinburg, is set to begin releasing sterile male screwworm flies into the wild. The USDA also plans to deploy $100 million in technology, including fly traps, lures, and border security measures. The announcement follows steps taken in by the USDA amid reports that the parasites were pushing northward from Central America. The USDA has the potential cost of a screwworm outbreak to Texas' economy to be $1.8 billion. Ten Commandments Law Heard in Federal Court A federal court in San Antonio on Friday heard arguments on Senate Bill 10, which the Ten Commandments by Sept. 1. Four organizations sought an injunction on the grounds that the law violates the First Amendment's freedom-of-religion provision. A lawyer from Attorney General Ken Paxton's office argued for the law, saying it is a passive display, causes no injury, and of the American legal system. The parties will return virtually Monday to finish questioning witnesses and deliver closing arguments, with a decision expected before Sept. 1. name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Shapiro tied to voter reg data tactic
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ce3604abd5&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Shapiro continues to promote partisan voter-registration site that mimics official state election site — and skims your data](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=483e7457ab&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
Governor Josh Shapiro continues to cooperate with a voter registration website with a web address deceptively similar to the official Pennsylvania Department of State’s, but which also harvests the registrant’s personal information for partisan political advertising. _Broad + Liberty_[ first reported](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=68d7a708d2&e=b7b3eddce2) on the website vote.pa last year, pointing out that the website address was a classic example of website impersonation, where a person or entity creates a web address (also known as a URL) that is extremely similar to a well trafficked, official web address, but that has minor variations such as being off by one letter. In the most recent example of Shapiro’s cooperation, the governor appears in a Facebook[ video ad](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=94e4fb2e22&e=b7b3eddce2) promoted by a local political action committee, Black Leadership Pennsylvania. In that video, Shapiro urges the user to register to vote, and the ad’s link takes them to[ vote.pa](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d5acbbec94&e=b7b3eddce2) — just a few keystrokes off from the official state registration website,[ vote.pa.gov](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=19c10d088f&e=b7b3eddce2) **Why It Matters.** Vote.pa is a project of Commonwealth Communications, which is run by J.J. Abbott, a longtime Democratic political operative and former communications officer for Gov. Tom Wolf. **[Vote.pa](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6a1e943bff&e=b7b3eddce2) **will register someone to vote if the user fills out all the required information. But it will also pocket the user’s personal data. The website’s privacy policy specifies, “We may use your personal information in connection with our political efforts and activities.” The policy also tells users, “We reserve the right to share your personal information to third parties as part of any potential business or asset sale...or similar type of transaction.” One irony is that[ vote.pa](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c5d97b9715&e=b7b3eddce2) is similar in a sense to “cybersquatting” sites of the kind Shapiro used to warn Pennsylvanians about when he was attorney general. **Quotable.** “I am concerned that he’s continuing to use those data mining operations on Pennsylvanians because I think it’s difficult for the average person to discern what is a campaign website and what is an official state government website,” Sen. Kristin Phillips-Hill said. “Because when you look at these, they look nearly identical. And this sort of tactic is what you expect from a fringe group, not from someone who sits as the governor of the commonwealth.” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4ba218f2c7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Predatory finance meets magical thinking at Crozer-Chester — and patients lose](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c1f7d1df95&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Frank Speidel_
A health care desert has emerged in Delaware County. There are currently only two hospitals, Riddle and Mercy Fitzgerald, operating in a county of around 576,000 where there once had been six. The four additional hospitals of the Crozer Health System, Crozer-Chester, Taylor, Delaware County Memorial, and[ Springfield began closing in 2022](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7865675e02&e=b7b3eddce2) after their acquisition by Prospect Medical Holdings. On January 12, 2025, PMH filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy. On January 13, 2025, the[ Philadelphia Inquirer reported](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5fdab0679f&e=b7b3eddce2) the state health department cited Crozer for diverting heart attack patients because of nursing staff shortages and noting reports from staff of supply shortages. **Why It Matters. **At the time of its acquisition by Prospect in 2016, the not-for-profit Crozer Keystone Health System had debt on the order of $300 million with approximately $51 million funding The Foundation for Delaware County. There seems to be a pattern. A private equity investment (PE) firm acquires an asset, a healthcare system, worth hundreds of millions. The PE then refinances the asset in the magnitude of billions allowing the PE to reward itself in order of hundreds of millions. The asset, the healthcare system, burdened by the debt and debt service and having burned through pension funding and other obligations such as unsecured creditors, files for bankruptcy. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ef55b49da2&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Ben Mannes: Is Philly ready to fire Krasner? Judge Dugan thinks so.](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3444a88f8c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Chester County hires a “Chief Experience Officer” as taxes rise — corporate titles at public expense](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dbc591701a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Celebrating getting Columbus Day back in Philadelphia](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c757be735a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Where formalwear meets flip-flops](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=073086add2&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Ben Mannes: Washington, Philadelphia, and the problems of home rule](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c86049af50&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Lloyd Smucker: Big Beautiful Bill puts hard-working families first](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=533b2b3ae3&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
President Donald Trump’s takeover of law enforcement in the District of Columbia has ruffled a lot of feathers. But is it illegal? Writing for the _Free Press_ this week, Prof. Jed Rubenfeld of Harvard Law School informs us that “Trump has more power over D.C. than any other city in the United States, and he seems to be [well within his legal authority](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d0e1435291&e=b7b3eddce2) — for now.”

D.C.’s crime has been an issue for decades — even [Senator Joe Biden said so](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7503c2cbc6&e=b7b3eddce2) back in 1992. It’s had its ups and downs since then, but it’s never been a completely safe city. Now, President Trump wants to clean up America’s capital. Democrats, naturally, oppose this, like they oppose whatever Trump is doing. It might be smarter for them — and more useful for DC residents — if they could get on board and make the capital America’s showcase, not its basketcase.

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. Stay up to date on all of this and more when you get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Todd Shepherd Governor Josh Shapiro continues to cooperate with a voter registration website with a web address deceptively similar to the official Pennsylvania Department of State’s, but which also harvests the registrant’s personal information for partisan political advertising. Broad + Liberty on the website vote.pa last year, pointing out that the website address was a classic example of website impersonation, where a person or entity creates a web address (also known as a URL) that is extremely similar to a well trafficked, official web address, but that has minor variations such as being off by one letter. In the most recent example of Shapiro’s cooperation, the governor appears in a Facebook promoted by a local political action committee, Black Leadership Pennsylvania. In that video, Shapiro urges the user to register to vote, and the ad’s link takes them to — just a few keystrokes off from the official state registration website, Why It Matters. Vote.pa is a project of Commonwealth Communications, which is run by J.J. Abbott, a longtime Democratic political operative and former communications officer for Gov. Tom Wolf. will register someone to vote if the user fills out all the required information. But it will also pocket the user’s personal data. The website’s privacy policy specifies, “We may use your personal information in connection with our political efforts and activities.” The policy also tells users, “We reserve the right to share your personal information to third parties as part of any potential business or asset sale...or similar type of transaction.” One irony is that is similar in a sense to “cybersquatting” sites of the kind Shapiro used to warn Pennsylvanians about when he was attorney general. Quotable. “I am concerned that he’s continuing to use those data mining operations on Pennsylvanians because I think it’s difficult for the average person to discern what is a campaign website and what is an official state government website,” Sen. Kristin Phillips-Hill said. “Because when you look at these, they look nearly identical. And this sort of tactic is what you expect from a fringe group, not from someone who sits as the governor of the commonwealth.” | | 2. By Frank Speidel A health care desert has emerged in Delaware County. There are currently only two hospitals, Riddle and Mercy Fitzgerald, operating in a county of around 576,000 where there once had been six. The four additional hospitals of the Crozer Health System, Crozer-Chester, Taylor, Delaware County Memorial, and after their acquisition by Prospect Medical Holdings. On January 12, 2025, PMH filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy. On January 13, 2025, the the state health department cited Crozer for diverting heart attack patients because of nursing staff shortages and noting reports from staff of supply shortages. Why It Matters. At the time of its acquisition by Prospect in 2016, the not-for-profit Crozer Keystone Health System had debt on the order of $300 million with approximately $51 million funding The Foundation for Delaware County. There seems to be a pattern. A private equity investment (PE) firm acquires an asset, a healthcare system, worth hundreds of millions. The PE then refinances the asset in the magnitude of billions allowing the PE to reward itself in order of hundreds of millions. The asset, the healthcare system, burdened by the debt and debt service and having burned through pension funding and other obligations such as unsecured creditors, files for bankruptcy. | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. What we're reading President Donald Trump’s takeover of law enforcement in the District of Columbia has ruffled a lot of feathers. But is it illegal? Writing for the Free Press this week, Prof. Jed Rubenfeld of Harvard Law School informs us that “Trump has more power over D.C. than any other city in the United States, and he seems to be — for now.” D.C.’s crime has been an issue for decades — even back in 1992. It’s had its ups and downs since then, but it’s never been a completely safe city. Now, President Trump wants to clean up America’s capital. Democrats, naturally, oppose this, like they oppose whatever Trump is doing. It might be smarter for them — and more useful for DC residents — if they could get on board and make the capital America’s showcase, not its basketcase. | | | Broad + Liberty is funded by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. * * *
Trump is ramping up his efforts to undermine our elections, friend. The federal agency responsible for defending our elections from cyberattacks and disinformation, CISA, **is being gutted.** Reports from across the country show election offices struggling without the security support they once relied on. Training has been scaled back. Communication has slowed. Tools to detect interference are going dark. This is Trump’s plan in action: Strip away the guardrails. Starve election infrastructure. Create chaos. Then step in to “fix” it with authoritarian control. **It’s already happening. And CISA is just the start.** We can’t wait for the next crisis to respond. Democratic Secretaries of State are stepping up in the vacuum — **defending our systems, training election workers, and holding the line.** [**But doing that without federal help takes serious resources. body:
Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, August 17th, 2025. | | |

| | | [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblAPdT4OAT5iA6-XQZk8AE0slYWKEM9qJbTxINOvqvNzVzKoI3SROh0h0_ixahEArFUhTdy26I8vZZ6rXz6r5Ns-OE4ZhWlacRtnYi_1EiOv-48Tx_TQCVSNu75tpImJc4NC4B3PfujywUIO5rjEg-GpItE1sN9_2xY51WBcnUw8Sy9x2bKKSNrDygflaQtvJtNMrsvqdAeYWn9Yd_JpKx9k6sAdmeGi_z7UpeswfkQd1sECNn_RPq42yGwQLtTsPsdrbKuGcAauh_-BtqJ3uUV3JcIhgHHKsJX9SeVGn6I0iVMF-D1kxJp6CLFkKBA-YbW7xeVow6V-Tr-sLBtOCr6KSuFBOmG5AFZyvuhh-zJFXN_MR75O0IpaZPGxvXK9ViJa704VUzHlnNHSGfIIVi1CA/4j4/w_54mtFdSAiNK4K0QR3RQQ/h0/h001.hv0L9XRGMowPWX8Up4RP-cO5cd6N06FeWtKXfiGj0yE)

🏛️ **Court Watch:_A court rules that Louisiana’s legislative maps violate the Voting Rights Act_ **
Amid a national push from Democrats to upend decades of illegal GOP gerrymandering, a panel of judges on the U.S. 5th Circuit Court of Appeals just ruled that the district maps for seats in the Louisiana legislature violate the federal Voting Rights Act by discriminating against Black voters. [Learn more about the ruling here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.SNYHID0cgDJeR88MOfSMuSyFrJodH4d8_axiA23d-6dXykrLN0M56QO3LB9xPCNXRVxrjsVz8KHR-fqb2Wzls561ACRN4CiGHUYAh2661ZMcbVkZBi7yE_KKWA9EOeVqvZQf4TMWB47IubdYCNJxoFihXvrjBJydn2yRllpoQtN9rW4UnQxOuvD9eRwlMfHqOL-lGGarCFMnhIdb9S38n1GEfhOho-9K29lbUGcBHxJbQ4qEEG_HQm9t2L3mlbUVsTIVDZwPN_6YqU4X7cmhQv-dbYhU75v2NPsnXpSnzU7_RWVaiktnXEujnCSbQceOHQKBv4YpUXrOTrq45pInZ5Zwql6Vn_oz70P4x_mos8Nuuy3llFPQG87Hvug34jHWqmN82rEzE5tHKkuo5MnZDps6d8C-F3TevioAvDYymNqwTpE_Ivnv4Wcr2az-sy_H_y29hFwnsYg7VwBt9sA6to6D-tQxlCK--MMIc9UaoConW0AoxbZ3qVugcXGw-RtUljizsNywo_LEIfY4-hREjVcl2PtFnbE8ydiU6wd5Sz4_Aj-tmkQPSv_boPf0uQywf8fgh7X57Ik4B0q9oCmEH0g6UqcB6wOE_rgN5xBg9XZF9TdJ0WJh2opdc4hzvDwJwbab05AZFpgWA9GsntUTYw/4j4/w_54mtFdSAiNK4K0QR3RQQ/h1/h001.nAUcgXalnWoBPaaCV6ccuoAyWrUmFm0Uqy8zxMd28-Y)
🫏 **DLCC Leadership:_Board Chair Andrea Stewart-Cousins Joins MSNBC to Discuss GOP Schemes to Rig Maps & Undermine Democracy_ **
DLCC Board Chair and New York Senate Majority Leader and Speaker Pro Tempore Andrea Stewart-Cousins joined _MSNBC’s The Weeknight_ to discuss how the DLCC’s national strategy to win statehouses across the country will position Democrats to combat the GOP’s unprecedented schemes to redraw maps mid-cycle and protect democracy. [See what she had to say here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYCgYdbAVDKG4aG-Rro66zk8_F73jpDYakw3k9vok2E4FkAxj9qZuMc52cywp67xP30ukEhA7aY3YCosxftsThkl5LU-AOjs8yCiREg4wcCyufd7eZ8F5W_ATveZAsfdscpGw2Xu3tDJ7olRcg8DKshbEFIRIf7tJ4J3YkAS2YucaIuxz9jrLmpJGI2JePWaeNgoaCQAW31TQtyqP66NasskkQ_5Pv3IzP1wcL33G_i04L0zFyJy-YpBoDl555AadMmd4GkhUuLfso4VmoPjdJ-ipf_H3NiwU7DfVMW6ITAnPCmf7rPX9-ZjLooptxemKM2RvZe7S84ijJUYbF8XrwJ3vVHWsnOih8hmyTwftYjzX6IBTumwOb2XJdisxqh4bB0PNX9vcfNYpVj2EwRdtQDFOkeKQN-fUirxn-IYub3NDHZH-HQ8vZvJB7we8M5IfdxSoru4g7jpb41TDd4JgHAwZcIFBhpv9MzqZvDvG-mgc2AvlU7cOH04P1GfQHKFUe6L-NzbkY3QJhp5uPBt_tZiat-LBYXpxeimaC3W6YheqArWCdJPgKMl_008t_3_VTZPNilTriXTWPaz8GuKP1xh_91boyElzM37wIFwfEgc0TN3AfAcVY69NpASK64XMr9J6C72P2NzFgq8oke0Ws-2KTE6V0PMGN4_Uan7iGWt/4j4/w_54mtFdSAiNK4K0QR3RQQ/h2/h001.bcxKe1EPwrWulIprHxfC4TPmwRM3TsghJuOFkMaiCGU)
📖 **Read:_The Answer to the Redistricting Math? More Democratic State Legislatures_ **
The DLCC penned a _Meidas Touch_ column after launching **DemsOnRedistricting.com** and calling for all Democratic state legislatures to pursue mid-cycle redistricting. [Read the column here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_vsyAIK9iIZ8L11tEqJdgcxBN7GRb9fKRTuST_S_ciebKdJHpbWNDYV6MFpYCP4_9QG9FCRIdHkpIE-e4njVqXQLsHKnY6w6SUNk4LTOhPCVqFVQqiKwFYOec1ia3Msl73GVFpjN2besjDNPvoe2_b8e8VDceKV6hDecbPk6hhsuu8KveCFWLSx9YahZPSzrVI8bCQMyJQDv8NeFXfUrA61sk-NQicVbLAgkf3WkKTp3WquwrW2yF3mGU8LuFW_EAhu43JpIHCYhGlY7xoAQRbc8x_LbyypUkpzHvUWSZxKG6DQAtke8TavmApElAYvc-neieHosJqGAR1TGDzjSXwxbZ2KJT6OBbAKP3GlCt92Mhab5N69oNwV_8KF2YUi9xSdUU549tPqXtXSlfgoWYYvkvLcNj1VaQ3Md7dnRG_D7eFH2NVCnTVgww6ubvd-1UyQ76UgvC5LGD6Y7-ys-rto7mxKTTyOxXPpMDh29YlMqoZfp1KMF1i6l8H5hMZUwmZ2US2V15SDrdnJC5UhyInjBbDOmZnZDBvvwtjJzeuIfpwGYRDJmRZiJVtEfn0qw/4j4/w_54mtFdSAiNK4K0QR3RQQ/h3/h001.SVFPFP4yi1mWmtioOaBy_oqK4BMze8daMcuHAUvYGnc)
🔦 **Spotlight:_Leslie Mehta prepares to flip a seat in the VA House_ **
The DLCC announced Leslie Mehta as a Spotlight Candidate in her race to secure a seat in the Virginia House this November – she is running to flip her district blue. As the former Legal Director of the ACLU of Virginia, she has long been a champion for the people of her state. If elected, she will focus on strengthening the economy, investing in public education, and expanding access to affordable health care. [Learn more about Leslie Mehta → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW7iyz3WnsgDWJUDLbGMRg-kl5oR57yqgmVlin0wwR__TAeQqrOYPAd8WgfVp0oIidBRMDmCDPkwzlrz7EK0NXlqeHyjmFJ4ZCO964dkmg14JpMh5AwQvZwl8VrDOwSaUXZGWx2ZhqfTiC09Ht7I0TmNzSOp3fH-HdylCn3096Z_9VDdKZplzeM66reZZBxj9d2qBEpqt2zI5bwaERBYdq8ZABW9fudIlERxeFioAH1YKllQ9dhekahQEPKGgJcC6YYlPqa-QE1y7pCPPWtIEDrjdxVBEsun0bvMHyLQAFPSfEDCsdPw451lGN5Gis4K59qMRvHMzBMfcnnHabo9RmBZWvE32OAnmsaoS-yMvjOYvrjPIKSUFU_I88THfoHXaTQZftsPc3UvBBKvaJRPBosBqBj2ltAbFmqGRqph0EICZZk4F1YxCY_JJoPtoi3-1pjduIyOySfwrkeGuxu4F-o4R7SzCXHfShXr0QlDcKeQ_1XOzmEHj6NUP3N8bEV29XyLLvppFy8qucSf36FnT1LVaVlDItBNFOlwFHvnbQYrWU4hAL7VLRiGc7LxrWVOe3Q/4j4/w_54mtFdSAiNK4K0QR3RQQ/h4/h001.Wb33M8Mt0JFS2gfHd3DiiXV2chkB80l09o4CvWTUoac)
**🗳️ Upcoming elections:_Democrats work to build progressive power_**
State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. [**With Trump and his MAGA allies assaulting our democracy, Democrats are making key investments to elect state legislators who can block the MAGA agenda.
