The last election was an America First mandate, but we cannot afford to rest on our laurels.

You and I must [ACT NOW to build the RED WALL](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t15b5o&__onlt=h) by focusing our energy on MUST-WIN battleground states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

Otherwise, these bad actors will come back into power and resume their subversion of our American way of life.

They will destroy everything that this country stands for, namely the Constitution and the Bill of Rights.

Friend, we now have proof they tried to undermine President Trump's victory before.

** _What else have the Democrats done to stop us from achieving victory that we don't even know about yet?_**

This is why we are fighting door-by-door, ballot-by-ballot, to win in critical battleground states.

[It's also why I'm asking you to pitch in and help us build the RED WALL by donating today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t15b5o&__onlt=h)

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: RE: Demand Congress protect people over polluters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Fight back against attacks on environmental protections: | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWTkGe_X2kehZNvcqr-F2nxE0qeY4co7iPVipMU_zzRGmpnPX9rzyw5sQ0Nf6jEujrPZKjbF5OjRy0N-ZvUq__DE3yVENxmeVFfaMWj5XnFIGMp4U1D9fkYP0Xhx2aZu6CsecwRCFcjf43ZBaR_Z5OZBnhACqKj9z2cQ85a5zQ2sLWeo6z4AtykyOrWg8Bralc04vRzkGtMXo2P2B105A2Hg/4j4/xZuR4c_cRemoYTKgYF0v5g/h0/h001.E9HOg2z0hBWi0DogstIDTmliZF_a6wwO7UcajRQF1Pw)
---
Friend, The Trump administration is overturning crucial environmental protections for our communities, and we’ve got to fight back. They’re rolling back the drinking water standards that we won to protect people from PFAS forever chemicals, which will increase exposure and endanger public health. They’re also moving to gut all regulations on greenhouse gases, which are the primary driver of climate change. Already, the climate crisis is wreaking havoc on our communities: My home state of Michigan recently suffered some of the worst air quality in the world due to wildfire smoke, and continual floods are hurting my neighbors too. [**Please add your name to demand Congress act now to protect people over polluters.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTAUm7pPbRcVtevYQzKMOhF5-02QF9PVC8-vIyhaAOZGuC7h3x2RlutvfYYd0V72LA7TyhwltMtoRkWChaGqCRlXNRzBanIWdGMMgnBcYD1KhCQVyeE7I4SXS6Ib3uniZcilVkjbYIF6n2A8-ixEDYyfpdGnEloKSZtqTSrpGh1P84Ng2ZNJK5C-KRqlbpuCvJ3H6M340ArGzLTXnyq0EITV71zWtmPo1YA7ceEoTx3Z7Zre1y3CmokE4t27UkhP3a0k7mxW6lYValJCyvOvX0_xhaBYBH1Fdw6gmuqSQa8lglCbcvNv8H-BFXK8DZ0vkxw/4j4/xZuR4c_cRemoYTKgYF0v5g/h1/h001.jyF7VvIsYvPQsg5T3Dy-_oBOpehSiLmY8bPNQYGOnuA) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTAUm7pPbRcVtevYQzKMOhF5-02QF9PVC8-vIyhaAOZGuyq_PMWXT3KrIcM9TDpMXXNEWa6KeI8ZOe5cqSkUACkxelgAoJkUz_FTAWkviVBi5kXtvzmyFvlALkTpyjugnxT5jZLSlIXKmrM5AoUK2Vwe8kqADxsQfbY5D2rZ1Sssjc5eDh2hkh1689QrX4fFIGehsjx_ofFDAvke77Rgji8ggrCdt_kQG5SowzZSRYhQmR7A-6Ulr2LlbsGk02-V_YGmQwZ43EnjYWms4Dx0wiAhjUHzhEF6jARx0reDPnqVn5Hi1wxpqD1co0dHdantVSw/4j4/xZuR4c_cRemoYTKgYF0v5g/h2/h001.0uaBTbgqpQ9XxheNbP9AzvKIH59-OcmV4M9dbTBGYT0)
---
As Trump attacks essential environmental protections, Congress must move to strengthen policies that protect people from pollution and climate change. We need more of these policies, not less.
Relatedly it’s time to pass legislation that can help end environmental racism and secure environmental justice.
For example, my _Cumulative Impacts Act_ would stop corporations from concentrating their industrial pollution in Black and brown communities. Black Americans are 75% more likely to live near industrial polluting facilities than white people, which has**** compounding harms for public health—leading to high rates of cancer, respiratory diseases, infant mortality, and more.
Passing this policy would be one step toward the future we need, where all of us can live and thrive.
[**Will you sign now to demand Congress respond to Trump’s rollbacks and protect people over polluters?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTAUm7pPbRcVtevYQzKMOhF5-02QF9PVC8-vIyhaAOZGuCZyKBmHu177b-LKvMhAPL-9tBXPbXsqEs8HIDTA-qVWgm3LbIbbMlJq3C45zrazq_5phOgvD0bKVloEu2MrJcjMYeij32QuS9lrNexfQhJX2vBHTu4qcJDMTEpuQI-h9dPgho188u6Fob0AH-i62MBNqqui0UwymmwfKsuv7BiAw89ap5yy2xgMKQVJuiKkZPnbhX9ISBxZnbf7dJHw1kcgsGlp1Gzcpd63gWElcJvGxvgduqYvVc33dnmsomrUrDWE3h6G89T_i5ucg87NJog/4j4/xZuR4c_cRemoYTKgYF0v5g/h3/h001.pXFI9rmlhTfw81zzYhjpTF7W9-4_fPbd-EPABVSom-Y)
Thank you for taking action and demanding better.
With you in the fight for our rights and our climate,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rashida Tlaib
Date: Sat, Aug 16, 2025
Subject: Demand Congress protect people over polluters
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Recently, wildfire smoke gave Michigan some of the worst air quality in the world.
The climate crisis is already wreaking havoc on our communities, and it’s threatening our right to breathe clean air.
We know that greenhouse gases—which are released when cutting down trees or burning fossil fuels—are the primary driver of climate change. That’s why for years I’ve worked to hold the fossil fuel industry accountable and pushed banks to stop funding fossil fuel projects and deforestation.
But the Trump administration is moving to gut all greenhouse gas regulations.
At the same time, the Trump administration is rolling back protections that we won to defend drinking water from forever chemicals (known as PFAS) that are dangerous to public health. This move will increase PFAS exposure in our communities, violating our human right to clean water.
Our government has a responsibility to protect people from contamination, pollution, and greenhouse gas emissions—and I will continue fighting for this to happen.
[**Can you sign the petition demanding Congress act to put people over polluters?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTAUm7pPbRcVtevYQzKMOhF5-02QF9PVC8-vIyhaAOZGuhlgKUs7yhm67UlX3FeqXPKp_qvE1b7jTAopKZl0B24F590qtmBSxTyU4uluDVdWZkJkR5nBeLYvhlRANmQep1LVIpotGS3rj8OJlPA4VpBvDRFxIJi7kerob8bkkNBFsFija8L7c9wDos5cbZJRiWYidP7BDM75YSI2zG9SENav5qjDvSbbTID75fq83nZ-kX56U7O-lKC3XcNfN2RmZ0T-TuN9Ub82-hcsbWjC4OKlKpiE8mHytEbhowVPBcFmAZ6-pE0rwzJCVczJ3yLXyHw/4j4/xZuR4c_cRemoYTKgYF0v5g/h4/h001.4Ld4z9Q4jR0piNlVgXfwRnTyU1gXs9OtO_I2LhDuzFw)
[SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTAUm7pPbRcVtevYQzKMOhF5-02QF9PVC8-vIyhaAOZGuAb_9LkuIxPE6JLXI8jykKbdLiT9OqE01L_Dq2dsV1tvkp1Ylffyjeso3VL4WAKKDe-T49mKa8TXlgUbGmLa09MW74--XQxovopVKl9XhDJNVEfevbYXildNsWY2QtGaKAfT8S8HzYr46_ka_jfi3RSlka5xI5vva4qW2VF1YibEp4O1AJ3ty7aoYdc5nvWQnyzTRtQQNoDe3m3n_acA_JO26a9eaYWR550wpvb5MfjUGIbNQq_QIXpAgOx8_9--_In5nVI9or4W6i7meH5AMAA/4j4/xZuR4c_cRemoYTKgYF0v5g/h5/h001.U0DtOruYLBR5FLVLgofz-CN-kyhbjtyExMe7VIyO7-4)
---
Despite clear scientific evidence, the administration is trying to remove the Environmental Protection Agency’s finding that greenhouse gases endanger human health. This “endangerment finding” is a foundational part of all policies related to greenhouse gases.
Climate scientist Michael Mann explained: _“The importance of the endangerment finding can’t be overstated. It’s been the primary tool that we have had to actually regulate carbon emissions and meet our obligations under various global agreements to address the climate crisis.”_ 1
With the president trying to overturn key environmental policies, it’s up to state governments and Congress to strengthen protections and defend our communities.
Congress must push back against climate denial and disinformation from fossil fuels and right-wing groups. We must set and strengthen standards for clean air and water, and hold corporate polluters accountable to following those standards.
We must also pass policies to secure environmental justice and end environmental racism, like my _Cumulative Impacts Act_ , which will protect and empower residents of frontline communities who already experience corporate pollution.
This bill would stop corporations from concentrating their industrial pollution in Black and brown communities, which they’ve done for years.
Black Americans are 75% more likely to live near industrial polluting facilities than white people.2 Living in such heavily polluted areas has**** compounding harms for public health, leading to high rates of cancer, respiratory diseases, infant mortality, and more.
Having grown up in Detroit by the Marathon Oil Refinery and other corporate polluters, I know what it’s like to be in a frontline community treated as a dumping ground. We cannot let communities of color be poisoned or treated as sacrifice zones.
[**Will you add your name to demand Congress act now to protect people over polluters?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTAUm7pPbRcVtevYQzKMOhF5-02QF9PVC8-vIyhaAOZGu2-We83vRL9tdOUBeAInqzXNDKPehd28fTXa-BF-tqNTtTWhW_49m8-lyqgupJDk7W8JUFx79I7nVEuCvQ_KB3mcUnY2Iqm0gA2gVJvJQu117dkFI0ZFNPRxEoMDICWBt2Er6Bc_54qbMOxc1leo6vUhB-obDK1P-igHWFLb4Fh697puk-Ls9Npghu57nzBQOkq_sYFeDZN6fslda9S9b9bcr-UTtSFaqLVZsvqMqYJxf0Vkv6sYdmsoW6bnBR2rR3ZwzpVXlHAzVf78cbMddDw/4j4/xZuR4c_cRemoYTKgYF0v5g/h6/h001.e2Yau_3zBhKE0-oBeslR2kpJFIHaJ4i58wzGj_CRc3A)
Thank you for taking action.
With you in the fight for a better future,
Rashida

clean_body: Fight back against attacks on environmental protections: | | | Friend, The Trump administration is overturning crucial environmental protections for our communities, and we’ve got to fight back. They’re rolling back the drinking water standards that we won to protect people from PFAS forever chemicals, which will increase exposure and endanger public health. They’re also moving to gut all regulations on greenhouse gases, which are the primary driver of climate change. Already, the climate crisis is wreaking havoc on our communities: My home state of Michigan recently suffered some of the worst air quality in the world due to wildfire smoke, and continual floods are hurting my neighbors too. | As Trump attacks essential environmental protections, Congress must move to strengthen policies that protect people from pollution and climate change. We need more of these policies, not less. Relatedly it’s time to pass legislation that can help end environmental racism and secure environmental justice. For example, my Cumulative Impacts Act would stop corporations from concentrating their industrial pollution in Black and brown communities. Black Americans are 75% more likely to live near industrial polluting facilities than white people, which has** compounding harms for public health—leading to high rates of cancer, respiratory diseases, infant mortality, and more. Passing this policy would be one step toward the future we need, where all of us can live and thrive. Thank you for taking action and demanding better. With you in the fight for our rights and our climate, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib Date: Sat, Aug 16, 2025 Subject: Demand Congress protect people over polluters To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Recently, wildfire smoke gave Michigan some of the worst air quality in the world. The climate crisis is already wreaking havoc on our communities, and it’s threatening our right to breathe clean air. We know that greenhouse gases—which are released when cutting down trees or burning fossil fuels—are the primary driver of climate change. That’s why for years I’ve worked to hold the fossil fuel industry accountable and pushed banks to stop funding fossil fuel projects and deforestation. But the Trump administration is moving to gut all greenhouse gas regulations. At the same time, the Trump administration is rolling back protections that we won to defend drinking water from forever chemicals (known as PFAS) that are dangerous to public health. This move will increase PFAS exposure in our communities, violating our human right to clean water. Our government has a responsibility to protect people from contamination, pollution, and greenhouse gas emissions—and I will continue fighting for this to happen. Despite clear scientific evidence, the administration is trying to remove the Environmental Protection Agency’s finding that greenhouse gases endanger human health. This “endangerment finding” is a foundational part of all policies related to greenhouse gases. Climate scientist Michael Mann explained: “The importance of the endangerment finding can’t be overstated. It’s been the primary tool that we have had to actually regulate carbon emissions and meet our obligations under various global agreements to address the climate crisis.” 1 With the president trying to overturn key environmental policies, it’s up to state governments and Congress to strengthen protections and defend our communities. Congress must push back against climate denial and disinformation from fossil fuels and right-wing groups. We must set and strengthen standards for clean air and water, and hold corporate polluters accountable to following those standards. We must also pass policies to secure environmental justice and end environmental racism, like my Cumulative Impacts Act , which will protect and empower residents of frontline communities who already experience corporate pollution. This bill would stop corporations from concentrating their industrial pollution in Black and brown communities, which they’ve done for years. Black Americans are 75% more likely to live near industrial polluting facilities than white people.2 Living in such heavily polluted areas has compounding harms for public health, leading to high rates of cancer, respiratory diseases, infant mortality, and more. Having grown up in Detroit by the Marathon Oil Refinery and other corporate polluters, I know what it’s like to be in a frontline community treated as a dumping ground. We cannot let communities of color be poisoned or treated as sacrifice zones. Thank you for taking action. With you in the fight for a better future, Rashida 1. 2. * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: Now’s the moment to show what our movement is made of.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250817-1480-foote&t=1001&akid=1480%2E342411%2EwnjM6W ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The fight for our democracy and our future is on the line — and we need
your help. We’re coming to you to ask if you can [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250817-movement.xj6zqf&refcode=em20250817-1480&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1480%2E342411%2EwnjM6W ]chip in a
$3 donation to the Squad Victory Fund today.

$3 to stand up to Trump’s authoritarian playbook, MAGA’s
hateful attacks, and anyone trying to tear our country apart.

$3 to take on the billionaire-backed corporations that put
profits over people every single day.

$3 to back our progressive champions in Congress who fight
unapologetically for working families and justice.

$3 may not match the millions raised by Republican
mega-donors, but together, every grassroots donation adds up to real
power.

This movement doesn’t answer to CEOs or corporate PACs — we answer to you.
And with your support, we’re growing unstoppable, people-powered momentum
from the ground up.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250817-movement.xj6zqf&refcode=em20250817-1480&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1480%2E342411%2EwnjM6W ]Will you chip in $3 today and help fuel this fight for
bold, progressive change? Now’s the moment to show what our movement is
made of.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250817-movement.xj6zqf&refcode=em20250817-1480&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1480%2E342411%2EwnjM6W ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1480%2E342411%2EwnjM6W

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:
Thousands have signed. But your name is still missing and time is running out.

|

Peter,

We’re disappointed to see your name still isn’t on the letter to Governor Gavin Newsom.

While Trump threatens to JAIL Democratic leaders for defending our democracy, _you’ve stayed silent._

Governor Newsom showed courage. The very least we can do is show we have his back.

**But right now, your name is still missing.**

Don’t let Trump’s authoritarian tactics slide, take a stand for our democracy:
[Add your name now »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113491198/563948886/1091503328?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250817_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMjM1MjBkLTg0N2ItZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nudK6zB0ILIHeU2DUqKl1dnYb1uikSLpHWdhF67Hmhw=) | [SIGN THE LETTER »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113491199/563948888/1091503328?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250817_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMjM1MjBkLTg0N2ItZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nudK6zB0ILIHeU2DUqKl1dnYb1uikSLpHWdhF67Hmhw=)

— Democracy On the Line
FWD:
\---------------------------
After Trump attacked Governor Newsom over the unrest in Los Angeles, he’s facing a new wave of right-wing rage! Look ↙↙
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113491200/563948892/1091503328?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20250817_EMLTR_E1_T0_AC_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlMjM1MjBkLTg0N2ItZjAxMS1iNDgxLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nudK6zB0ILIHeU2DUqKl1dnYb1uikSLpHWdhF67Hmhw=)**

body:
Let’s do this again. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113491944/563952118/823540626?refcode=ea.3369a69e-847b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.3369a69e-847b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzY5YTY5ZS04NDdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TeHq2LXCkg3PaLSNDMKxsBdeRSzP3QhJNDsJfFIiExo=&emci=b5dbd25a-087a-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3369a69e-847b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17205535)
North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map, Peter. I should know. I won both my elections for Governor in years that Donald Trump carried the state. It wasn’t easy, but with a groundswell of grassroots enthusiasm, we prevailed. In the last few weeks, we’ve begun building out a team that can win here again — this time for a seat in the United States Senate. We have a plan that we know can provide Democrats with success here in NC. And it’s only been possible through your support. **[I have to ask for that support again today, Peter, because we’re preparing for this to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. With your help, we’ll engage with voters from every corner of this state and prove that our vision for the future is right for North Carolina. Please give what you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113491949/563952129/-1743631236?refcode=ea.3369a69e-847b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.3369a69e-847b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzY5YTY5ZS04NDdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TeHq2LXCkg3PaLSNDMKxsBdeRSzP3QhJNDsJfFIiExo=)** Statewide elections here are competitive and expensive. Republicans are already planning to spend hundreds of millions against us because they know this seat is the key to the Senate majority. But as we begin sharing our message with North Carolinians — a message rooted in respect for the values we share and the fundamental rights we’ve spent so long fighting for — I am confident that we’ll be able to bring voters onto our team. We can succeed here in North Carolina if we work together. **[If I can count on you to stand with me in the fight, please pitch in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113491952/563952130/-1743631236?refcode=ea.3369a69e-847b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.3369a69e-847b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzY5YTY5ZS04NDdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TeHq2LXCkg3PaLSNDMKxsBdeRSzP3QhJNDsJfFIiExo=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113491956/563952137/-1743631236?refcode=ea.3369a69e-847b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.3369a69e-847b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzY5YTY5ZS04NDdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TeHq2LXCkg3PaLSNDMKxsBdeRSzP3QhJNDsJfFIiExo=)**

I won both my elections for Governor in years that Donald Trump carried the state. It wasn’t easy, but with a groundswell of grassroots enthusiasm, we prevailed. In the last few weeks, we’ve begun building out a team that can win here again — this time for a seat in the United States Senate. We have a plan that we know can provide Democrats with success here in NC. And it’s only been possible through your support. = Statewide elections here are competitive and expensive. Republicans are already planning to spend hundreds of millions against us because they know this seat is the key to the Senate majority. But as we begin sharing our message with North Carolinians — a message rooted in respect for the values we share and the fundamental rights we’ve spent so long fighting for — I am confident that we’ll be able to bring voters onto our team. We can succeed here in North Carolina if we work together. = | = Thanks so much, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Fixing the damn roads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
This is what happens when government works for the people |
#
---
Team, When Governor Gretchen Whitmer first said she’d “fix the damn roads,” it wasn’t some slogan cooked up in a consultant’s conference room. She was listening — _really listening_ — to Michiganders across the state. Parents in minivans dodging potholes on the way to school. Small business owners watching delivery trucks get delayed by detours. Workers worried that a blown tire could mean missing a shift and their paycheck. She promised action. And now, we’re seeing it. **By the end of this year, Michigan will have repaired over 23,000 lane miles of road since this team helped elect Governor Whitmer, supporting over 188,000 good-paying jobs.** That’s what happens when leaders listen, roll up their sleeves, and get to work. But here’s the problem: Republicans in Washington are betting they can slam the breaks on our progress. They want to drag us back to a politics of gridlock and neglect — the same politics that left our roads crumbling and communities struggling. We can’t let them hold us back. The election season is here, and toss-up races are already taking shape. **If we don’t act _now,_ we risk losing leaders who know how to get things done for their communities.** **[That’s why Fight Like Hell PAC is going all-in to elect more results-driven leaders and protect the ones we’ve got. But we can’t keep up this momentum without you. Will you chip in $10 right now so Governor Whitmer can keep fixing the damn roads — and help elect leaders who will fix what’s broken in Washington, too?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113492328/563953165/1700965107?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250817_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1ODkyY2QtODQ3Yi1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nHKPhDrcEMoH1KRDe45y7DUrjhWi_jIoLXgMstdPKes=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113492332/563953169/1700965107?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250817_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTM1ODkyY2QtODQ3Yi1mMDExLWI0ODEtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nHKPhDrcEMoH1KRDe45y7DUrjhWi_jIoLXgMstdPKes=)

name: Shane Cory
subject: Urgent: Help Us Close the Gap on Tom Homan's Protection Costs
body:
Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to protect Tom Homan?
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdzNIREYzbjJWNA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP2hpZHM9bmNON29JWGJNaWV4R3Fscw/gaKIBhw/s7meda48f6e)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a) Dear Patriot,

Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to **protect Tom Homan**?

Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of **real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all.**

On December 23rd, a close friend reached out with a somber request.

He had just received a call from Tom Homan himself—President Trump's newly appointed Border Czar.

Tom was hitting the ground running to secure our borders and keep dangerous criminal illegals out, but **he faced a credible death threat**.

Shockingly, the outgoing **Biden Administration left him and his family with zero protection**.

Joe Biden knew about the evil plot brewing against Tom, **yet he abandoned him to the wolves**. That's not just negligence; it's a blatant abuse of power by a corrupt outgoing administration who chose to leave an American in danger due to petty politics.

As founder of American Liberty Fund, I couldn't stand by.

Our mission is to advance liberty through electoral politics and educate folks on corruption and overreach—**like this exact scenario**. But we had to work quietly and it wasn’t appropriate to reach out to the public for support as that would have made the situation more dire. So we bootstrapped the costs and put the best men in place to ensure Tom and his family were safe through inauguration day.

Today, we’re left with thousands of dollars in expenses that we simply cannot pay. Flights, hotels, equipment. These bills need to go away and [**I need your help as a patriot to make that happen.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a)

Back in December, we scrambled overnight to fund and assemble a security detail. It was a no-brainer; keeping Tom safe meant protecting the man who would safeguard our nation's freedom from invasive threats. We didn’t even think of the expense, **we just had to do it**.

We called on our network of veterans, and seven brave men volunteered immediately. They dropped everything.

Leading them was a Navy SEAL who quit his job on the spot, said goodbye to his family, and glued himself to Tom's side for a full month.

The team included a former Army Special Forces combat medic, three Army vets, and three Marine Corps vets—**all with serious personal security experience**.

One was a tracker, another a retired law enforcement officer, and one specialized in executive extractions.

These weren't polished Secret Service types; they were big, bearded warriors who cleared paths just by walking through crowds. **Mean as hell, experienced, and laser-focused on the mission**.

They racked up over a dozen trips across the country. An advance team scouted ahead, while others guarded Tom's family back home, coordinating with grateful local law enforcement.

If the government had handled this, it would've cost taxpayers hundreds of thousands monthly. But our volunteers pinched pennies, keeping costs low. Still, expenses added up—travel, gear, basics, and that’s where you come in. [**Will you donate to help cover these remaining costs?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a)

On January 20th, our SEAL handed Tom over safely at President Trump's inauguration to a new government team.

Mission accomplished. But back in February, we asked for help covering remaining reimbursements and thanking those heroes. Many stepped up, but we're not quite there.

Today, [**we face an urgent shortfall of $5,720**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a). One unpaid member of that detail—a dedicated veteran—has been covering these bills out of his own pocket, scraping by to make ends meet. I did the same.

We have just seven days to pay this back and relieve his burden. **[**Can you chip in $50, $100, or whatever you can right now to help these patriots?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a)**

[**Your gift will cover the gap and show gratitude for their sacrifice**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a) and for keeping one of the most important men in the Trump Administration safe and secure.

Since handing off Tom that day, he's been doing incredible work as Border Czar.

Under President Trump, Tom has led a historic crackdown on illegal immigration.

Apprehensions at the border have plunged 70% since he took over, with Title 8 encounters dropping to record lows—just 12,000 last month.

He's overseen massive deportations, eradicating criminal migrants and boosting ICE morale sky-high.

Agents call him "the best person for the job." I knew that as soon as I met Tom. This is his passion. He’s protecting lives. Protecting innocent Children and his drive to eradicate the Criminal Cartels is unmatched – and they stand no chance against this man.

Tom's efforts have sparked self-deportations in droves—illegals are fleeing out of fear of real enforcement.

He's partnered with Trump's policies to smash cartel routes, stop human trafficking, and slash drug smuggling. President Trump himself congratulated Tom and the team, calling it "one of the great success stories in the history of borders anywhere in the world."

This is liberty in action: **a small, effective government protecting citizens without overreach**.

But we can't forget the men who kept Tom alive to make this happen.

That $5,720 shortfall is weighing heavy, [**and our veterans need relief now**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a).

**[**Please, donate today—every dollar counts toward closing this chapter honorably**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a)****.**

Tom's positive impact this year has been praised far and wide. From boosting agent morale to driving down visa overstays by 80%, he's proving that real enforcement works without harming innocents or stealing freedoms.

Media outlets note his "ironclad" results, and conservatives hail him as **a hero making America safe again**. But government corruption like Biden's abandonment to Tom reminds us why ALF fights: **to expose and counter it**.

With just seven days left, let's rally. **[**If you can give $25 or more, it would mean the world to these veterans**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e11167966/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTEtbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsNnZ3U1lwZw/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxMjU4X3dyMQ/gaKIBhw/sav0ed3f63a)****.**

Together, we're advancing liberty one step at a time.

With Deep Gratitude,
Shane Cory
President

Veteran, United States Marine Corps

clean_body: Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to protect Tom Homan? | | | | Dear Patriot, Do you remember the chilling story I shared back in February about the urgent call I got to protect Tom Homan? Let me refresh your memory, because it's a tale of real American heroes stepping up when the government failed us all. On December 23rd, a close friend reached out with a somber request. He had just received a call from Tom Homan himself—President Trump's newly appointed Border Czar. Tom was hitting the ground running to secure our borders and keep dangerous criminal illegals out, but he faced a credible death threat. Shockingly, the outgoing Biden Administration left him and his family with zero protection. Joe Biden knew about the evil plot brewing against Tom, yet he abandoned him to the wolves. That's not just negligence; it's a blatant abuse of power by a corrupt outgoing administration who chose to leave an American in danger due to petty politics. As founder of American Liberty Fund, I couldn't stand by. Our mission is to advance liberty through electoral politics and educate folks on corruption and overreach—like this exact scenario. But we had to work quietly and it wasn’t appropriate to reach out to the public for support as that would have made the situation more dire. So we bootstrapped the costs and put the best men in place to ensure Tom and his family were safe through inauguration day. Today, we’re left with thousands of dollars in expenses that we simply cannot pay. Flights, hotels, equipment. These bills need to go away and Back in December, we scrambled overnight to fund and assemble a security detail. It was a no-brainer; keeping Tom safe meant protecting the man who would safeguard our nation's freedom from invasive threats. We didn’t even think of the expense, we just had to do it. We called on our network of veterans, and seven brave men volunteered immediately. They dropped everything. Leading them was a Navy SEAL who quit his job on the spot, said goodbye to his family, and glued himself to Tom's side for a full month. The team included a former Army Special Forces combat medic, three Army vets, and three Marine Corps vets—all with serious personal security experience. One was a tracker, another a retired law enforcement officer, and one specialized in executive extractions. These weren't polished Secret Service types; they were big, bearded warriors who cleared paths just by walking through crowds. Mean as hell, experienced, and laser-focused on the mission. They racked up over a dozen trips across the country. An advance team scouted ahead, while others guarded Tom's family back home, coordinating with grateful local law enforcement. If the government had handled this, it would've cost taxpayers hundreds of thousands monthly. But our volunteers pinched pennies, keeping costs low. Still, expenses added up—travel, gear, basics, and that’s where you come in. On January 20th, our SEAL handed Tom over safely at President Trump's inauguration to a new government team. Mission accomplished. But back in February, we asked for help covering remaining reimbursements and thanking those heroes. Many stepped up, but we're not quite there. Today, . One unpaid member of that detail—a dedicated veteran—has been covering these bills out of his own pocket, scraping by to make ends meet. I did the same. We have just seven days to pay this back and relieve his burden. and for keeping one of the most important men in the Trump Administration safe and secure. From boosting agent morale to driving down visa overstays by 80%, he's proving that real enforcement works without harming innocents or stealing freedoms. Media outlets note his "ironclad" results, and conservatives hail him as a hero making America safe again. But government corruption like Biden's abandonment to Tom reminds us why ALF fights: to expose and counter it. With just seven days left, let's rally. . name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: This endorsement is proof we’re building a campaign strong enough to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
SEIU members are the backbone of New Mexico’s hospitals, clinics, and other essential services.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3817%2E400544%2EjIiG6O)
Hi — today, we're proud to share some big news:
**SEIU, the nation’s largest healthcare workers’ union that represents thousands of frontline health care and essential service workers, has officially endorsed Deb Haaland for Governor of New Mexico!**
CIR/SEIU members are the backbone of New Mexico’s hospitals, clinics, and other essential services. Every day, they deliver babies, tend to emergencies, and keep New Mexicans healthy — often under enormous strain.
And with Trump’s Medicaid cuts threatening to shut down up to eight hospitals in New Mexico, **we need a governor who will fight to protect care for every family.**
That’s why Deb laid out a clear and urgent plan to:
👉 Protect Medicaid coverage
👉 Bring and keep more doctors and nurses to the state
👉 Increase mobile health clinics in rural areas
👉 Add more healthcare navigators to help cut through red tape
**We’re proud of the movement we’re building, and SEIU’s endorsement is proof that we’re building a people-powered coalition strong enough to win.**
But we still need help to raise the resources to grow our campaign and get Deb’s message into every corner of the state!
**[If you're with Deb, can you pitch in $5 right now to help elect her New Mexico's next Governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250817_1_seiu?amount=5&refcode=em20250817-3817&refcode2=3817_400544_jIiG6O&akid=3817%2E400544%2EjIiG6O)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250817_1_seiu?amount=5&refcode=em20250817-3817&refcode2=3817_400544_jIiG6O&akid=3817%2E400544%2EjIiG6O)**
Be fierce,
Team Deb Haaland
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250817-1&t=2&refcode2=3817_400544_jIiG6O&akid=3817%2E400544%2EjIiG6O)**

name: Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth
subject: I’ve been everywhere…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-17 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-17]
With the August District Work Period beginning, I’m happy to report I’ve wasted no time in getting out of Washington and back to the communities of the Third Congressional District. In addition to official-side community meetings and events, I’ve been crisscrossing the District (and beyond!) supporting Democrats up and down the ballot.
[https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeSK7kttN5q73GLeMQ9xJ8DG8u7BU6alokMOmzpAxVtFopkd2_jxQqIFSOP9agsgy2EhhalV5jyJGaezCqMrQdkkEHWnL0H14DLocBzcatOGTz11_OpwAe1nL8jEGSWHY2Y5ywn?key=6wv9psJPxAhKbFHXmouH5A][https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeP4AZzdz0fsXJvXQ9PLQy74v2NwOCmRxseb-H6b3H6OkEm3sw_hmgBDwd-mFvNMsO-krdBmYOdT1M6aDEIWANhDGWtVsowb8YfKp5x1l9A7ffvOVtGtaO0J5vX9wuPJzC2I5QPxQ?key=6wv9psJPxAhKbFHXmouH5A][https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXf73Qg0KO4tRJxTT3wUiOfS9Vpm6MxP4KKLfoJsi5JeuIUCp2ex7CWx1IJ8C9SSHdwS7OMKAec36p_3ZuP7CHM5GEk9cP9j8nTxlFqQ4Cc1amXsXonAOh1CBV_nhZPz91B_7A8JKw?key=6wv9psJPxAhKbFHXmouH5A][https://lh7-rt.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeXd05HNLncde70LgA4gQQafmPQj_H_LBHZvNXyhCodRQ49JJKio5q8FyF_yYcwSpREVMpOH8_KM5KTrOPnpKcAzxax53DkQPnenRJz4Y2tm7IuISYvxJf0AZJshRFitYkaEGzz6w?key=6wv9psJPxAhKbFHXmouH5A]
So far, I’ve gotten to attend campaign kickoff events for state partners and Democratic clubs in MD-03, the Indivisible Statewide Conference, and I even organized folks from our District to head down to Virginia to knock doors for the Commonwealth’s next Governor, Abigail Spanberger. I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: our community is ready to get to work on and win majorities.
That got me thinking about how I could best mobilize the talent and drive of our community to support Democrats all over the county. From critical races in Maryland to the bellwether election in Virginia to winning four crucial Congressional seats in Pennsylvania next year, I can’t do this work alone.
The journey and work ahead takes resources. If you want to be part of the fight, chip in here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-17]
CONTRIBUTE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-17&amount=5.00]
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-17&amount=10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-17&amount=25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q3-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-08-17&amount=50]

Thank you,
Sarah Elfreth

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: Where were you on November 3rd, 2008?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
The fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d32d21c648484acdae4306d9401ab6e7&_e=yf42Y0P0iO2aYaPXHIE2OrTp1_TeObPLMGs5CNLZa-wK03H4Y2c5t-YzO52L5uJ486WHg00m9uC-hujZ7F1-RRYk6SqiKr_YLg-Qa-prINv4h5zTeThfbEGphCvru0LvhXKtq5B0I2TLJrEDPqbFFuJA33c5TKOYVdK6iC3vV1qrwRZq3DomAtFPrdJvobafRHrWxtlxIK_WwYoVDfCZUo-GiewQbrK_m8u1m-jWgD_u1gt8hHxzCrMwuLs7ntelLRAIRnTWJc5H5tWuR2JHEVCa50vHOb_VLF87sOj06NwOksm_p1QJl0un_Mj8SXt-N4AJg5-Gb75l-G2EONEJEdZt8lZSzXfNX6IzFiK8HpqhWeUCKkPboFtFu4O-XtBlcw79FvaZUuxZU74oU2Yn6JUEF1d6H18k6Q3hmd9BxbhPxX1p6TO6rRe_OiSYdbkBCa8QWZOlBLyzmhb8YUJTbDjV1GIT4s1NKd3J4e2L0S_-fG25waR_PKLWxs4zDkeA5l0LZsqTiIiV_x2KVeG6YtzPAVDg1ncU2WYdjrz7kcOsKu5VHrDBVohlCugt-EJDGGkoj7XxGWuDqVGUy_LVo15bTXcrBnU2kcPdD7Ya6m59K6rFYxYZ4AjlQDSi0UukuTZAfe7vVAXWmqu7hZ7BoQwrtDtHY85pmdPES00EOzftgWwTQfQrkJtYf6aWznYTwzJoZr48kbajoYjbA67HO_Znfnox_GIQQX0Tk4QQaSp0J9QfIGeh_M9XHwja4X4u)

---
Peter,

**Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away?**

I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this _**critical email**_ right now.

I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, **I decided: I would fight for my country.**

_[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d32d21c648484acdae4306d9401ab6e7&_e=yf42Y0P0iO2aYaPXHIE2OrTp1_TeObPLMGs5CNLZa-wK03H4Y2c5t-YzO52L5uJ4WPsK7BauzPW9tVuVvRqnWTRwjWEw5e_aGm5S9AVsxdUkE7I2qVeiBgI-jKOI5hhZPNVr0SIWAzdFWT83NQB0ktLKHy7dCu87IVdS3QY9SC1bTOk7cUMYbBcCBeBbj5rfuDurqNx2BUPKAHtcon3BITAlSLP5_klevQ9RczCK9w2e7_RhIhQeWdUu5egQUZsYBD6PKsAUORMcxZ7JpTzZHP0J2yqxM6jzWgvM8BC1tDzY_vQtXywAmEdzeIxyUHGoxWiU1lO8qWa8N76PQk8VFcV1_KmUCQw8sPgVZ-PG2FlJHcfMmQA9-7Jn_QmHYAWExXgcvUfs5vUizlhLJUh9CGwk_1t8N9Fi7GZi91qePL2Uopj0Ylw4T3bubx6GubbT8u7MGGdaIl0mEkAJIe3rz9EUJya4LBVyMaf5h6Y5H58vaT2MmqW_no4zoHQCDzeXHdHn_MNO-RIfeugEKyX_5AL2AsdiHjHrE9vBkrhhaQ0CxcIxjilnW6Bu31U8ZF6Z39ME7oT5R2bLKeDOxrnDHJoQR-yzBBkeiSUyq1F8olt5pFeRyyEMaSFKI1pyhdzI7GBFsk8FICmzMxVcix09gWJkj2hd4j84_aXv8_NEf1O166EAVdo-meGM_cMNkbDDHvkisIe6Smoy1GRQboEHckgT2UiyI8KwgTSLAp4Cro0%3D)_
My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs.

Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d32d21c648484acdae4306d9401ab6e7&_e=yf42Y0P0iO2aYaPXHIE2OrTp1_TeObPLMGs5CNLZa-wK03H4Y2c5t-YzO52L5uJ486WHg00m9uC-hujZ7F1-RRYk6SqiKr_YLg-Qa-prINv4h5zTeThfbEGphCvru0LvhXKtq5B0I2TLJrEDPqbFFuJA33c5TKOYVdK6iC3vV1qrwRZq3DomAtFPrdJvobafRHrWxtlxIK_WwYoVDfCZUo-GiewQbrK_m8u1m-jWgD_u1gt8hHxzCrMwuLs7ntelLRAIRnTWJc5H5tWuR2JHEexIjIt3zmA6_Q3LwW81d1BjQ1GkfbAw3X3-DyMJ3ZelRKOJfxQsxlSN2FqJYmHjn5beaHQ2pKV0DkcihDiWHZ0KBP4XJw2-4GSPs721CLR7E6pgjFE9ZGrEuVlTo3-WbW49gbqtmSySySITTzVciNOdV9AJAzHeY8Clj0EH2QZ3mb2xt22Oew47rr01Re__0r8jK18u00xxHSLSsrE0oKy7BPdqJM6s07lkfvdwLYeNRjJyFXYJArBkIHpBLiARVppsdSOOoIItYjYr9jCxgLH8CnFmdcP3Jdfz2t7y2Q1lkGX1FpN1Jee3nrqjtWAy8dDW5WFOrz0K67a69lSSVHKm_OYpk2Nw2D9gbMhwPr68sP2g5OayqL4PEOohvUlcw3AayipNEcllmOHReTIo_rea0xnfaGppt7NE6kCeJR4DibhecpsMWKNYauHH5hBWCWvu5fXKscdGdzK5XteYokt-XJ3aXw631tGu582XMLwY)
For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight.

But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield.

While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs.

While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with.

This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away.

**[Do you have $1 you can spare today to help me and my team get this U.S. Senate campaign off the ground? We could really use the help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=d32d21c648484acdae4306d9401ab6e7&_e=yf42Y0P0iO2aYaPXHIE2OrTp1_TeObPLMGs5CNLZa-wK03H4Y2c5t-YzO52L5uJ486WHg00m9uC-hujZ7F1-RRYk6SqiKr_YLg-Qa-prINv4h5zTeThfbEGphCvru0LvhXKtq5B0I2TLJrEDPqbFFuJA33c5TKOYVdK6iC3vV1qrwRZq3DomAtFPrdJvobafRHrWxtlxIK_WwYoVDfCZUo-GiewQbrK_m8u1m-jWgD_u1gt8hHxzCrMwuLs7ntelLRAIRnTWJc5H5tWuR2JHEcuAcj7ZizH44gBeBOg0uQVDB3-z4epMFIcQyAMazYElUx4frikLGTExQh-Gh72_bGVeobHmoE2i-CBvo_iYB9Ao8WP-8yvDgNmGDqYNKdwfrZfLG0IWL833kLH-E1UVaDZCSbHE0_BLUOi-FAZKUAkiBuuc2CzULtcQoJqkxrimv_I0Td90s3uafWVPVSl-Fu1YtU2yMKrRg8qg8kPCqj-FDiD2Rvjshq8mpqFNbwxuGZaZCGK6R2ptYPQ8sULxa2_uaMHZ4jM7LUCo8glrbvBgKXOIj9yrSAfIMFKTnYquamHeeyOKCC5s-N3kLnAKMzalt8UiDWDG6GUoYAVcxISSschGDJ-7uD04OHox03tX2Jr3SkaFXbQvi680LslZbXHcX0P654zfmF8pxqlDU7v_B_SrWCCA_HJF0ycL9tqq06ClJEBObnLrQ0F679feI9KVOt535hjtUaxFz2Xw_FukJj95v3P5QFeCd-VPSwiB)**

**I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform.**

I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies.

We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever.

The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. _**My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund.**_

clean_body: The fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform. | Peter, Did you know that Americans spend between 8 and 12 seconds reading an email before they decide to keep going or click away? I hope you’ll indulge me today and spend a bit more time than that reading this critical email right now. I still remember the morning of September 11th, 2001. I was an 18-year-old in Bloomington, Minnesota, watching smoke rise from the Twin Towers. In that moment, I knew my life would never be the same. That same day, I decided: I would fight for my country. My name is Adam Schwarze, a 20-year veteran of the Marine infantry and Navy SEALs. Shortly after my 18th birthday, I raised my right hand and swore an oath to defend the United States of America. That oath took me from the frozen streets of Minnesota to the sands of Iraq, the mountains of Afghanistan, and into the shadows where danger lived. For 20 years — nine deployments to more than 70 countries — I carried our flag into places where failure was not an option. I fought beside the bravest men and women I’ll ever know. I’ve seen the cost of freedom up close. And I will never forget why we fight. But today, I look at our country and see a different kind of battlefield. While working families struggle to put food on the table, Washington insiders get richer. While our border is overrun, politicians turn their backs. While our children fall behind, radicals push an agenda that erodes the values we grew up with. This isn’t the America I risked my life for. And I’ll be damned if I stand by and watch her fade away. - I’m running for the United States Senate, but not because I want a title. Not because I planned a political career. But the fight for America didn’t end for me when I hung up my uniform. I don’t know how to quit; I never give up. And I’m not afraid of a fight. Just ask our enemies. We can rebuild this country — stronger, freer, and prouder than ever. The Senate seat I’m seeking hasn’t been winnable since 2009, but now, suddenly, it’s a top-tier target for Republicans, and I plan to be the man who brings home the win for our party. My only problem is that I don’t have enough cash to get my campaign off the ground, and I can’t self-fund. I don’t know where I was on November 3rd, 2008, but when I write out that date, the last full day we had a Republican representing Minnesota in the U.S. Senate before an election, it feels like a lifetime ago. We will secure our border so we can welcome those who love America — and send criminals packing. We will rebuild our economy so working people can live with dignity and opportunity. We will put parents back in charge of their children’s education. We will defend the Constitution — every single word of it. But I can’t do it alone. I’ve carried our flag into battle. I’ve watched her fly over villages we freed from ISIS. I’ve seen her folded and handed to grieving families who gave their everything. I know what our flag stands for. And I will never stop fighting for it. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan P.S: The Democrat machine will pour tens of millions into Minnesota to try to crush this campaign before most voters even hear my name. They want a senator who will rubber-stamp their agenda. I’m not that man — and that’s why they’ll do whatever it takes to stop me. As a fellow American who loves this country, , will fuel this fight and send a message that America is worth defending. FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
Peter, this is my most urgent request yet.

---
| | | Peter, this is my most urgent request yet. I’m launching an emergency petition to prove Americans overwhelmingly oppose the Republican scheme to privatize Social Security. [I need your help to reach 10,000 signatures before midnight to send far right extremists a powerful message: Hands off our Social Security.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113493312/563954891/-1184644151?source=20250817_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTcxNTg2OS04NzdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PNyq38oCvWb-ISxfFMqlHcpagQLJ1Rpi7qeNCVlxd0=&emci=549f8883-b977-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=15715869-877b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21290350) [_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: We can’t let Republicans slash our hard-earned benefits. Republicans are working behind closed doors to privatize Social Security.
We must stop them.
That’s why I’m officially launching a critical petition to send the powerful message that our earned benefits are non-negotiable. Period. Full stop.
Seniors have paid into Social Security and worked hard to retire with dignity.
[We need to act now. Millions of Americans are depending on us to step up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113493316/563954895/-1184644151?source=20250817_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTcxNTg2OS04NzdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PNyq38oCvWb-ISxfFMqlHcpagQLJ1Rpi7qeNCVlxd0=&emci=549f8883-b977-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=15715869-877b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21290350)
[_I need a strong showing to put an end to these reckless threats to decimate Social Security. Our seniors need us to have their backs at this critical time. I’m calling for 10,000 petition signatures to support one of our most beloved institutions before midnight. Will you add your name next to mine to stop the GOP’s heartless threats to cut Social Security? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113493317/563954896/-1184644151?source=20250817_em_pet_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTcxNTg2OS04NzdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2PNyq38oCvWb-ISxfFMqlHcpagQLJ1Rpi7qeNCVlxd0=&emci=549f8883-b977-f011-8dc9-6045bded8cca&emdi=15715869-877b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=21290350)
Keep the faith,
Hakeem

* **TOP NEWS**

**" Texas Democrats say they will return to state once session ends, California unveils retaliatory map," **Texas Tribune's**Alejandro Serrano** \-- "Texas House Democrats who left the state in protest of proposed congressional [redistricting](https://substack.com/redirect/8dd70ffb-b5a2-41dc-be93-d4d82e9d11e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) said Thursday they will return to the state after the Legislature adjourns Friday and California's state lawmakers introduce a retaliatory redistricting map in their state assembly.

In a statement, members of the minority party said their lawyers had advised them to return "to build a strong public legislative record for the upcoming legal battle" against the proposed reconfiguration of Texas' congressional districts. The new map, stalled since dozens of Democrats [left the state](https://substack.com/redirect/3d202915-2771-44c9-978b-9d1d2fd4b616?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Aug. 3, is designed to net the GOP five additional seats in the U.S. House. President **Donald Trump** pressured state leaders to undertake the effort mid-decade -- a rarity -- as the GOP tries to hold onto its thin majority in Congress.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/f4b970e1-1256-48fa-a2d4-0193937bec67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Gov. **Greg Abbott** , who has [asked the state's Supreme Court](https://substack.com/redirect/be827181-2549-40e4-8ac3-e16e35616ebd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to remove House Democratic Caucus leader **Gene Wu** from office, said earlier this week he would continue calling special legislative sessions -- [starting Friday](https://substack.com/redirect/be827181-2549-40e4-8ac3-e16e35616ebd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after both chambers of the Legislature adjourn. House Speaker **Dustin Burrows** said he would gavel out for the session if the lower chamber continued to lack a quorum, or the minimum number of present members required to conduct business.

The House, which needs 100 of its 150 members present to establish a quorum, has not reached that threshold since most of the chamber's 62 Democrats left the state for Chicago, Massachusetts and New York in an effort to stop the proposed redistricting. Democratic lawmakers say the new map is an attack on the representation of minority voters in the districts being redrawn, while Republicans have defended their right to redraw district lines for partisan gain whenever they want.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/f4b970e1-1256-48fa-a2d4-0193937bec67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Texas House Democrats broke quorum and successfully mobilized the nation against Trump's assault on minority voting rights," Wu, D-Houston, said in a statement. "Facing threats of arrest, lawfare, financial penalties, harassment, and bomb threats, we have stood firm in our fight against a proposed Jim Crow congressional district map."

California Gov. **Gavin Newsom** on Thursday called a special election for a ballot measure to ask voters to approve a new congressional map to counter Texas' effort. Earlier this week, [Politico reported](https://substack.com/redirect/496565fd-d773-4811-90de-f7a391c71c71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that California Democratic leaders said they had sufficient votes to pass the amendment.

"Trump's election rigging comes to an end now," Newsom said in a social media post. "California won't stand by and watch Trump burn it all down -- we are calling a special election to redraw our Congressional maps and defend fair representation. This is a five alarm fire for Democracy."" [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/cdd79664-5a2e-439c-81ea-99309f0f41f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**" Illinois judge denies Ken Paxton's bid for help rounding up Democrats," **Houston Chronicle's**Taylor Goldenstein** \-- "An Illinois judge on Wednesday ruled against Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton** in his [bid for help in rounding up House Democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/0c340793-7d64-4cd0-bb8c-73a3595301f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who fled there to block a vote on redistricting.

In a brief ruling, Adams County Circuit Judge **Scott Larson** found that he "does not have the inherent power" to decide whether the 13 Democrats that Paxton had claimed were violating civil warrants issued by the Texas House, let alone to help Texas enforce them.

Larson found that Paxton "failed to present a legal basis for the court to obtain subject matter jurisdiction over this action."

Neither Paxton nor the House Democratic Caucus immediately responded to a request for comment.

The third-term Republican attorney general filed a similar suit in California that is still pending." [Hou Chron](https://substack.com/redirect/ae9e5e5d-ada7-419b-b060-d94c54607bdb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

Thank you for reading as a FREE subscriber. » Become a PAID subscriber for $7/mo or $70/yr and SAVE TIME and be BETTER INFORMED. P.S. Some personal news: Amy and I are our first child -- a boy! " If something of importance is known in Texas, Matt knows it. With a decline in the number of credible news organizations, the Must Read Texas morning email is indispensable for anyone that wants to continue to be informed." - Former U.S. Senator Phil Gramm (R-TX) AUSTIN NEWSLETTER LAUNCHED Are you one of the 100,000+ subscribers to , a newsletter that delivers EVERYTHING you NEED TO KNOW about Austin? | | ---|---|--- Subscriptions are $5/mo, $50/yr or $199/lifetime here: . Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . TOP NEWS " Texas Democrats say they will return to state once session ends, California unveils retaliatory map," Texas Tribune'sAlejandro Serrano \-- "Texas House Democrats who left the state in protest of proposed congressional said Thursday they will return to the state after the Legislature adjourns Friday and California's state lawmakers introduce a retaliatory redistricting map in their state assembly. In a statement, members of the minority party said their lawyers had advised them to return "to build a strong public legislative record for the upcoming legal battle" against the proposed reconfiguration of Texas' congressional districts. The new map, stalled since dozens of Democrats Aug. 3, is designed to net the GOP five additional seats in the U.S. House. President Donald Trump pressured state leaders to undertake the effort mid-decade -- a rarity -- as the GOP tries to hold onto its thin majority in Congress. Gov. Greg Abbott , who has to remove House Democratic Caucus leader Gene Wu from office, said earlier this week he would continue calling special legislative sessions -- after both chambers of the Legislature adjourn. House Speaker Dustin Burrows said he would gavel out for the session if the lower chamber continued to lack a quorum, or the minimum number of present members required to conduct business. The House, which needs 100 of its 150 members present to establish a quorum, has not reached that threshold since most of the chamber's 62 Democrats left the state for Chicago, Massachusetts and New York in an effort to stop the proposed redistricting. Democratic lawmakers say the new map is an attack on the representation of minority voters in the districts being redrawn, while Republicans have defended their right to redraw district lines for partisan gain whenever they want. "Texas House Democrats broke quorum and successfully mobilized the nation against Trump's assault on minority voting rights," Wu, D-Houston, said in a statement. "Facing threats of arrest, lawfare, financial penalties, harassment, and bomb threats, we have stood firm in our fight against a proposed Jim Crow congressional district map." California Gov. Gavin Newsom on Thursday called a special election for a ballot measure to ask voters to approve a new congressional map to counter Texas' effort. Earlier this week, that California Democratic leaders said they had sufficient votes to pass the amendment. "Trump's election rigging comes to an end now," Newsom said in a social media post. "California won't stand by and watch Trump burn it all down -- we are calling a special election to redraw our Congressional maps and defend fair representation. This is a five alarm fire for Democracy."" " Illinois judge denies Ken Paxton's bid for help rounding up Democrats," Houston Chronicle'sTaylor Goldenstein \-- "An Illinois judge on Wednesday ruled against Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in his who fled there to block a vote on redistricting. In a brief ruling, Adams County Circuit Judge Scott Larson found that he "does not have the inherent power" to decide whether the 13 Democrats that Paxton had claimed were violating civil warrants issued by the Texas House, let alone to help Texas enforce them. Larson found that Paxton "failed to present a legal basis for the court to obtain subject matter jurisdiction over this action." Neither Paxton nor the House Democratic Caucus immediately responded to a request for comment. The third-term Republican attorney general filed a similar suit in California that is still pending." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. First and foremost, I wanted to say thank you

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113493717/563955983/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVjNjA3Zi04YTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=432sxKTKeDNrOPp31bx42GEF14ms9MgfNsnX0BldHgo=) Hey there, First and foremost, I wanted to say thank you. I know my team and I have been reaching out a ton lately, so I’m beyond grateful that you’re taking the time just to read this message. But to be completely transparent, I’m not only sending you this email to keep you in the loop with our campaign. [_**I’m also sending you this email to ask for your support and help me make sure this competitive seat doesn’t fall to someone who backs Donald Trump’s cruel agenda.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113493719/563955985/212706120?refcode=email_081725_option&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVjNjA3Zi04YTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=432sxKTKeDNrOPp31bx42GEF14ms9MgfNsnX0BldHgo=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113493720/563955986/212706120?refcode=email_081725_option&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVjNjA3Zi04YTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=432sxKTKeDNrOPp31bx42GEF14ms9MgfNsnX0BldHgo=)

Listen, writing these emails asking for your hard-earned money is my least favorite part of the job. I’d much rather send you a long list of bulletpoints of what I’m fighting for in Washington, and not have to worry about deadlines or budget crunches for even a second.
But that’s just not the way politics works right now, as much as I wish it did. The cold, hard truth is that these fundraising emails are necessary, because National Republicans and their super PAC allies are raising huge sums of money to take Democrats like me down — and we can’t just _hope_ that their attacks won’t stick. We have to fight them ourselves.
Losing this seat is not an option. If KS-03 flips, Republicans are essentially guaranteed to keep their House majority — which would mean two more years of completely unchecked power in the White House.
**But if we hold this seat and flip the House blue, it’s a different story.**
So yes. This is a fundraising email — because even if we don’t like it, winning in politics requires an enormous amount of resources.
[_**So I have to ask: If you believe in what I’m fighting for in Washington — like lower costs, a fair economy, LGBTQ+ equality, and so much more — will you rush a donation to help me defend KS-03? National Republicans are already sharpening their attacks, so we need all hands on deck to fight back.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113493722/563955988/212706120?refcode=email_081725_option&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODVjNjA3Zi04YTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=432sxKTKeDNrOPp31bx42GEF14ms9MgfNsnX0BldHgo=)

**[Which is why I’m giving away 500 of my new Dash Eagle cameras at below wholesale cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21805/6374453/21b574823a3902265f1298dd6a14f754d9eb6aee/1179b818e33d448493be69d2b72a2a883c697fbd)** Every time you hit the road, you’ll have an HD dashboard camera to record everything that happens on the road, and inside your vehicle... So if you get in an accident, an altercation, or if you get pulled over by the police... You’ll be able to **record every second** with crystal clear video and audio... And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... And you’ll never have to worry about not having any proof to back your case in court. It installs in just seconds and you can charge it in your car while simultaneously recording... But like I said... And it’s first come, first served... Oh yeah, did I mention that I’m giving you free shipping? I’m positive these won’t last long, so claim yours before they run out... | | | MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the person or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed.Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by newsletter@gunowner-news.com 514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US | | | | ---|---|---

* **TOP NEWS**

**“Beto O’Rourke PAC donated more than $1 million to Democrats during redistricting battle,”** Texas Tribune's**Colleen DeGuzman** \-- "Former U.S. Rep. **Beto O’Rourke** announced on Saturday that his political group, Powered by People, donated more than $1 million to Texas Democrats during a special session in which they walked out to deny Republicans the quorum they needed to pass new congressional maps.

In the announcement, O’Rourke said that “more than 55,000 donations” poured in from people across the country since the start of the first special session called by Gov. **Greg Abbott**. The money from his political group benefited the Texas Legislative Black Caucus, the Texas House Democratic Caucus, and the Mexican American Legislative Caucus.

Abbott’s first special session, which ended Friday, didn’t have a quorum for the past two weeks because most of the House’s 62 Democrats left the state to prevent proposed redistricting aimed at securing more GOP seats in Congress. He immediately called a second special session.

Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | TOP NEWS “Beto O’Rourke PAC donated more than $1 million to Democrats during redistricting battle,” Texas Tribune'sColleen DeGuzman \-- "Former U.S. Rep. Beto O’Rourke announced on Saturday that his political group, Powered by People, donated more than $1 million to Texas Democrats during a special session in which they walked out to deny Republicans the quorum they needed to pass new congressional maps. In the announcement, O’Rourke said that “more than 55,000 donations” poured in from people across the country since the start of the first special session called by Gov. Greg Abbott. The money from his political group benefited the Texas Legislative Black Caucus, the Texas House Democratic Caucus, and the Mexican American Legislative Caucus. » Abbott’s first special session, which ended Friday, didn’t have a quorum for the past two weeks because most of the House’s 62 Democrats left the state to prevent proposed redistricting aimed at securing more GOP seats in Congress. He immediately called a second special session. Last week, a Tarrant County District JudgeMegan Fahey sided with Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton , by People from fundraising for Democrats or financially supporting the quorum break. » Paxton on Tuesday argued in a motion that O’Rourke had violated the temporary injunction. He asked the judge to imprison O’Rourke for the duration of the lawsuit, and to fine the Democrat $500 for each alleged violation of the injunction. O’Rourke filed his own lawsuit against Paxton earlier this month after being sued by the attorney general. He’s asking a judge to block into Powered by People and alleges that he engaged in a “fishing expedition, constitutional rights be damned.” In 2021, when Democrats broke quorum and left the state to prevent a bill that sought to tighten voting rules, which eventually became law, Powered by People to help pay for their expenses, including lodging, travel, and meals. That was before the House passed new rules in 2023 imposing a $500-per-day fine on lawmakers who leave the state during sessions and said they aren’t allowed to use campaign funds to pay the penalties." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Sorry to be so direct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T307d607a-d2a1-4c41-9117-4ba24d89a408/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hey Peter, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: [Can you rush $10 to my re-election campaign and Blue Amp Action today? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2eb42254-b44c-4382-8eed-1ca7265dc1a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule. And I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won. That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me. There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021. So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us. [If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a2beee2-e463-446a-89e3-68de930e4734/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The campaign will be brutal. But this team wins the hardest battles. We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible. Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority. And we will win again — with your help. [Please: send $10 to my re-election campaign and Blue Amp Action today. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fece52a-de75-4572-b972-1df10a08c3ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With gratitude, Senator Jon Ossoff
