| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70875071-e387-4540-9798-8798f1ccc77b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: David Hogg
subject: We deserve leaders like Robert Peters in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re proud to support Robert’s campaign.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250817-1&t=1&akid=2535%2E587540%2E5-VJzS)
Peter,
State Senator Robert Peters is exactly the kind of bold, visionary leader we need in Congress — and exactly the kind of leader we started Leaders We Deserve to support.
This month alone, **_four_** of Robert’s bills became law in Illinois. His legislation:
✅ Supports community violence prevention
✅ Helps workers retire with dignity
✅ Improves services for children and families
✅ Overhauls how we respond to mental health crises
While so many politicians chase headlines, Robert is here delivering real wins for working people and making life better for his constituents and everyone in Illinois.
Now he’s leading the charge against Trump’s latest authoritarian threat — trying to reverse Illinois’ historic no-cash bail reform and send National Guard troops into Chicago.
Robert Peters knows that being poor or Black or Brown is not a crime. He’s not afraid to speak truth to power — **and now, he’s running for Congress in Illinois’ 2nd District.**
We’re proud to support him. But we need your help to send Robert to Washington and elect more young leaders like him across the country. **[Will you split a $5 between Robert’s campaign and Leaders We Deserve to keep powering this important work?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250817_1_peters?refcode=em20250817-2535&amount=5&refcode2=2535_587540_5-VJzS&akid=2535%2E587540%2E5-VJzS)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250817_1_peters?amount=5&refcode=em20250817-2535&refcode2=2535_587540_5-VJzS&akid=2535%2E587540%2E5-VJzS)**
This fight is bigger than one candidate or one district.
It’s about building a bench of progressive leaders who don’t just resist extremism — they deliver justice and hope. Leaders like Robert who inspire a better vision for the future.
Thanks for believing in this work,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250817-1&t=2&refcode2=2535_587540_5-VJzS&akid=2535%2E587540%2E5-VJzS)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
clean_body: We’re proud to support Robert’s campaign. Peter, State Senator Robert Peters is exactly the kind of bold, visionary leader we need in Congress — and exactly the kind of leader we started Leaders We Deserve to support. This month alone, four of Robert’s bills became law in Illinois. His legislation: ✅ Supports community violence prevention ✅ Helps workers retire with dignity ✅ Improves services for children and families ✅ Overhauls how we respond to mental health crises While so many politicians chase headlines, Robert is here delivering real wins for working people and making life better for his constituents and everyone in Illinois. Now he’s leading the charge against Trump’s latest authoritarian threat — trying to reverse Illinois’ historic no-cash bail reform and send National Guard troops into Chicago. Robert Peters knows that being poor or Black or Brown is not a crime. He’s not afraid to speak truth to power — and now, he’s running for Congress in Illinois’ 2nd District. We’re proud to support him. But we need your help to send Robert to Washington and elect more young leaders like him across the country. This fight is bigger than one candidate or one district. It’s about building a bench of progressive leaders who don’t just resist extremism — they deliver justice and hope. Leaders like Robert who inspire a better vision for the future. Thanks for believing in this work, David Hogg Leaders We Deserve

name: Heather G.
subject: Your supporter status enclosed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Can you help us beat the summer slump?
| Hi friend, my name is Heather and I help run the Voter Protection Project!

**I’m reaching out because I noticed that you have yet to confirm your supporter status to help us stop Trump and elect Democrats across the country.**

Summer months are always the toughest for fundraising — and with our entire Democracy at stake, _we absolutely can’t afford to fall behind._

**There’s no better time to step up.** Trump is threatening to serve an unprecedented third term. MAGA Republicans are building their warchest to defeat Democrats in 2026. Grassroots support from Democrats like you is vital right now.

[So today, I hope you’ll help us get through August strong: Will you confirm your status as a top Democrat so we can take back the House and Senate from the MAGA majority and save our Democracy? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93108?t=6&akid=20960%2E878179%2EtBm26w) | [CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORTER STATUS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93108?t=7&akid=20960%2E878179%2EtBm26w)
---
Thank you for all your help!

Heather G.
Executive Director
The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20960%2E878179%2EtBm26w). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20960%2E878179%2EtBm26w).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20960%2E878179%2EtBm26w) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=20960%2E878179%2EtBm26w). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20960%2E878179%2EtBm26w)
---

Across the country, MAGA donors are gearing up for the 2026 midterm elections determined to retain control — even threatening to further gerrymander districts like in Texas. | | | |

Hey friend,
The battle for the very soul of the nation is going to come down to Nevada.

Across the country, MAGA donors are gearing up for the 2026 midterm elections determined to retain control — even threatening to further gerrymander districts like in Texas.
Next November is our opportunity to restore balance, check the executive branch, and get back to legislation that serves the people. Democrats need to **flip three seats** to take back the House.
We have seen and felt too deeply the chaos and harm that comes when Donald Trump and his Congressional cronies are in power. We can put a stop to the mayhem if you’re with us, friend.
**[I’m asking for your support now, to prepare for 2026, because elections here come down to the very last cent and the very last voter. clean_body: Across the country, MAGA donors are gearing up for the 2026 midterm elections determined to retain control — even threatening to further gerrymander districts like in Texas. | | | | Hey friend, The battle for the very soul of the nation is going to come down to Nevada. Across the country, MAGA donors are gearing up for the 2026 midterm elections determined to retain control — even threatening to further gerrymander districts like in Texas. Next November is our opportunity to restore balance, check the executive branch, and get back to legislation that serves the people. Democrats need to flip three seats to take back the House. We have seen and felt too deeply the chaos and harm that comes when Donald Trump and his Congressional cronies are in power. We can put a stop to the mayhem if you’re with us, friend. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! Catherine The Nevada State Democratic Party fights for progress in the Silver State. name: Team DLCC
subject: Would you chip in $7 if you knew?
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
What if we told you we can’t secure victories in upcoming elections without you on our grassroots team? | | |
---
| |
---|---
**With just nine days until our next special election, is there anything we can say to convince you to**[ make a gift of $7 to support state Democrats across the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdtY88WzFRd6RVG8f9hYOXXg0_cJKnKmed8Csdj_JT4NUgLyfRq_QMgcwkncELhuPqzaw2dlQCcNZRM1uUK8OKU_LkGwtS2B41LRuSaqaK-USb0d0bDrEwFz2KkAXfH5kgmdPZt1YooDbXl8LY5hXHre1uItjtrf6UFPXkLA3xJCzuQhhFOdMct16hGWmZdws6rDSu6AlpyaAbHnjTPRB98Jti9atTxOdvA7FDivox_jSH4aAZK0aNiP8h4ki004h5AARcEp0hakhcE8MDt1ClLSenXEEQy8OuFe8T2Ved5kmiV8l0gJZW4TOq3vc-l1O7tTn9JxzAp8RLBxMhZV2uNFAtWv1pX1V_7RK3MdXPP_ui1gfjuNM3urgWH7PgQaVoVPftYHPxD4VIVnOKzwsHKf0FKA3KqRJrSLL8DlMqJHOd0PLWv4yRn7VSAZuf9IbCgRHEMv_f9NnzfiTmkXG6OAQro5aHlON8QKCn0XdmSTfcSCLkAXQ3pjtX_avxsyLTBimM9p8Rq_Fb2h9vANCipHokyLfVIJt8Ey2ZZ2fCZd-mcrF13aRbjGaZ1I26DAYkP_GYutate51eH2yiTNhSto/4j4/_T9OLsQdTiuEegS_ccmjRQ/h0/h001.6X8cYO6RX4sMn7sApGpxVN6soGICZOx0hX01SlB1b7A) What if we told you that on August 26th, Democrats in Georgia and Iowa are facing two key special elections to FLIP seats in Republican-held districts? What if we told you state legislators will have a role in drawing more than 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 legislative districts – and that expanding Democratic majorities gives our party the power to protect our democracy? clean_body: What if we told you we can’t secure victories in upcoming elections without you on our grassroots team? | | | | | ---|--- With just nine days until our next special election, is there anything we can say to convince you to What if we told you that on August 26th, Democrats in Georgia and Iowa are facing two key special elections to FLIP seats in Republican-held districts? What if we told you state legislators will have a role in drawing more than 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 legislative districts – and that expanding Democratic majorities gives our party the power to protect our democracy? What if we told you that right-wing billionaires are pouring millions into state legislative races ahead of elections in New Jersey and Virginia – and that Democrats are relying on grassroots donations to counter their spending? And, what if we told you we can’t secure victories in upcoming elections without you on our grassroots team? We’re counting on grassroots supporters in your state and nationwide to get involved, take action in communities like your town, and chip in $50, $25, or even $7 before polls close in our next election. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. Fellow Conservative,

I'll level with you - we will have difficulty keeping our hold on the Senate majority next November if you don't start involving yourself with the day-to-day business of the politics of it all.

For starters, were you aware that there are now THREE OPEN SENATE seats up for grabs where Republicans can go on offense?

> Michigan -> retirement of liberal Sen. Gary Peters. Pickup opportunity no. 1.
>
> MICHIGAN is a state President Trump WON in 2024, and withn Senator Gary Peters out of the way - Republicans should be primed to sweep to victory in the Great Lakes State.
>
> New Hampshire -> retirement of liberal Sen. Jean Shaheen. Pickup opportunity no. 2.
>
> New Hampshire is a state that just elected my former Senate colleague, Republican Kelly Ayotte, to the governorship last year, and with Senator Jeanne Shaheen stepping down - Republicans can WIN in the Granite State.
>
> Minnesota -> retirement of liberal Sen. Tina Smith. Pickup opportunity no. 3.
>
> Minnesota is a state ready to make a change following failed Democrat rule from the likes of lunatic liberals such as Governor Tim Walz, and with Senator Tina Smith opting to retire - this signals Republicans have the momentum to finally flip the Gopher State.
These three seats each present Republicans with a unique and exciting opportunity to compete in contests where we don't have to run our candidates against incumbent senators running for reelection.

There hasn't been an open seat in New Hampshire in 15 years! And in Minnesota, there hasn't been an open seat since 2006!

We have such opportunities this cycle, Fellow Conservative, but our good fortune won't mean anything if you don't get involved.

name: Team Crow
subject: Families are being squeezed by Trump’s tariffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Back-to-school season is here, and thanks to the tariffs pushed by the Trump administration, parents and teachers are paying more for school supplies this year.

Colorado parents look to cut costs on back-to-school supplies as prices rise
— CBS News Colorado, August 2025
This year, as [Nemitz] picked up her supplies, she noticed something right away: higher prices. "I even went back to my Target purchases from last year and looked at the prices. I did notice some of the basic things, like the 50-cent things are getting closer to the dollar, water bottles are much more expensive."

Families across Colorado are being squeezed by Trump’s tariffs and having to make hard decisions as parents balance paying the bills and making sure their kids are prepared to head back into the classroom.

Pencils, paper, backpacks, and clothes are all more expensive than they were this time last year, and many parents are planning to cut back or reuse supplies from last year.

We have to make everyday goods more affordable for working families by building the Democratic majority that will stand up to these reckless and chaotic tariffs. Can we count on your support today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025?amount=]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: No warrant. No badge number. No accountability.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
A U.S. citizen in Los Angeles was slammed to the ground, handcuffed, and detained by ICE for 24 hours without access to water.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250817-5348-footer&t=1&akid=5348%2E420207%2ElBqY_W)
Peter,
A U.S. citizen in Los Angeles was slammed to the ground, handcuffed, and detained by ICE without access to water.
**No warrant. No badge number. No accountability.**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250817-1-ice-petition/?source=em20250817-5348&akid=5348%2E420207%2ElBqY_W)
**This is what unchecked ICE power looks like** — and it should outrage every single one of us. If ICE can get away with brutalizing a U.S. citizen in broad daylight, what do you think they’re doing to immigrant communities behind closed doors?
This is why I’ve introduced legislation to make it explicitly illegal for ICE to arrest U.S. citizens, and to hold agents accountable when they break the law. Because no one in this country should have to live in fear of being **snatched off the street** by their own government.
But let’s be honest: the only way we’ll get Congress to act is if they feel **overwhelming pressure** from the public.
[**That’s why I’m asking you to add your name to demand Congress pass my bill preventing ICE from arresting U.S. citizens.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250817-1-ice-petition/?source=em20250817-5348&akid=5348%2E420207%2ElBqY_W)
**[Sign the Petition »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pj-em-20250817-1-ice-petition/?source=em20250817-5348&akid=5348%2E420207%2ElBqY_W)**
The Trump administration supercharged ICE’s culture of impunity, and this is only the beginning. It’s critical that we fight back — real people’s lives, safety, and dignity are at stake.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250817-5348-footer&t=2&refcode2=5348_420207_lBqY_W&akid=5348%2E420207%2ElBqY_W)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=5348%2E420207%2ElBqY_W)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5348%2E420207%2ElBqY_W)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:
|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113497170/563967550/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DonationHistory_250817_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmJmZWQ2ZS05OTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWIg3kAMbhMh3DcguLI1u6TebXQdWEbna4CDAWEl6Ag=) Derek,

It’s normal for campaigns to see fundraising slow down in the summer months – and we get it. Families are taking trips, kids are heading back to school, and folks are trying to enjoy these last few weeks of summer.

While we hate to interrupt with another fundraising email, the simple fact is, we can't afford to slow down right now.

So we’ll get straight to the point: We’re falling behind our fundraising goal for the month, and we need your help to get back on track. If you’re able to chip in a few dollars to help us overcome the summer slump, here’s a link to donate:

[_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250817-record**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113497171/563967551/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DonationHistory_250817_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmJmZWQ2ZS05OTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWIg3kAMbhMh3DcguLI1u6TebXQdWEbna4CDAWEl6Ag=)

Next year’s elections are shaping up to be some of the most consequential we’ve faced in a long time. If Democrats want to take back the Senate and finally put a check on Trump’s dangerous corruption, we simply can’t afford to lose **any** Democratic-held seats – including Senator Warner’s.

So we can’t let a slow fundraising month put this campaign in a weak position – especially not when Republican super PACs could pour millions of dollars against us at a moment’s notice.

That’s why we track supporter records throughout the year – and that’s why we’re asking if you can look at yours today and chip in to close the gap: **Mark Warner for Virginia August 2025 Supporter Record** **Supporter: **Derek **Grassroots donor this month? **No, not yet. **Suggested Action:** [_**Chip in your first $5 to go on record with your support >>>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113497172/563967552/1082117603?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DonationHistory_250817_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmJmZWQ2ZS05OTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWIg3kAMbhMh3DcguLI1u6TebXQdWEbna4CDAWEl6Ag=) When we fall behind on our monthly fundraising goals, it leaves us less prepared to respond to the GOP’s attacks.

Your donation today will help us overcome the slow fundraising months and build the early campaign infrastructure we need to protect Senator Warner’s seat and flip the Senate blue.

[_**Please, if you can, chip in your first $5 this month now >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113497173/563967553/1082117603?amount=5&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DonationHistory_250817_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmJmZWQ2ZS05OTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWIg3kAMbhMh3DcguLI1u6TebXQdWEbna4CDAWEl6Ag=)

Thank you,

Team Warner _Donation history reflects what we have on file this month for this email address. If you donated this month via the mail, under a different email address, or in a family member’s name, thank you!_ **********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113497174/563967554/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DonationHistory_250817_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmJmZWQ2ZS05OTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWIg3kAMbhMh3DcguLI1u6TebXQdWEbna4CDAWEl6Ag=)**********

name: Navy Seal Adam Schwarze
subject: These insults are about YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
This woman may not technically speak for the Democrat Party, but she has captured the essence of what her fellow members of Congress believe. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=090ccbdf4e314ea0b70d5700319fccce&_e=XPYLSF1JApI1qkpglD22YZ-_yO2ovuxuXI6roZV0wI8n1SyOvpYaqQtonX48VEMFPDb4mlwN1Mdb-_tCsPnT6hz-l75_vl7_rOx9CvxwdLN82kM0uHvItxN4KSpd1oL4nWfO914HPIZBbfgpm4f4FkUug8qNqeBIAeadOL09MLwTYdrcjHqYe6817b9WeKl6WuPt7yCfacSNMRCal3Uwv8BouYJJr8OZlYZtlm3G66pzkGwmIA6Q8E6b1iAnBxj3b8E8z5AD8BTh1lOjaP96fVafAZDIsZ2F1-87IUaDujhSmnG8s7VaPYB7NEKpa7-CSeic2D-msEGjuU5LtHzqXqenvlu81QXWorCm2yNgwecRzwzDEsCSz-ZgjoN7uUiwQwSgO0WioynhGhCj4xwmNvU1a4Ca__dJLY5ik6JXvCPBWn85ky5ceMoWZW_95BtnCXm5oBzgJXEV_M6e1_R-_U4UX4iZssEhMEqqVRRCqQq0gT-WtG-zf-xCYgstp_8h0Vz8RI8ItTifa-mkh9Qm7z9kH8NLZTZ1w70CkuCG7mGn9qMJpc9HFQLBVkl5EHkignuBU7v2PapctJQvIC-tP0CsGYpFGxubiYGmLdN_F95F18Z3VJlcySdp0Em9wz0QuEDCOJYpLc1yHCi332pPC3ern1p7BzWh20kSlrihMyd4ByxUR2am2OLv9H-8BtHB3pYLHV_Y-bQK-XP1YdeErS-NXPVfOxoztgZdr4Jjva7kfL6z_tQEHtECXanVGDg101xlMPN7ObsnJxXVy2uUnA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

_**“Asshole. Buffoon. Mofo. Wannabe Hitler. Gangster. Vile villain.”**_

Those are just a few words Rep. Jasmine Crockett used to describe President Trump. But let’s be honest: those insults aren’t just about him. They’re about you. About me. About anyone who leans conservative, wears a uniform, or believes in this country’s founding values.

They think we’re backward. They believe we are in the way. And worst of all, they think we’ll take it.

**As a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran, I’ve faced far worse than name-calling. I’ve deployed to over 70 countries. I’ve led warriors into battle. I’ve endured life-threatening missions.** And the most important lesson I’ve learned? Quiet professionalism always wins the day.

name: Greg Casar
subject: Greg Abbott just crossed a line
body:
#
Peter,
Greg Abbott just crossed a line.
For the first time in the history of Texas, our Governor is threatening to make us a one-party state.
After Democratic legislators went around the country to rally and organize voters against Abbott and Trump's extreme redistricting scheme, Abbott is now threatening to unilaterally and illegally expel them all from office in retaliation.
**Let me be clear: this is not what democracy looks like. This is what a wannabe dictator does.**
They know they can’t win fairly — so they’re trying to erase the opposition altogether. And if they get away with it here, Republican legislators will try it in state after state until there’s no one left to stand in their way.
I’m not going to let that happen. But I can’t take on this fight alone.
**[Please split $5 between Justice Democrats and our movement so I can continue fighting back against Abbott’s authoritarian power grab. Your contribution will help me mobilize more Texans against this threat to our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250817-gc?refcode=em20250817-36936&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36936_1203867_qK0WJq&akid=36936%2E1203867%2EqK0WJq)**
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250817-gc?refcode=em20250817-36936&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36936_1203867_qK0WJq&akid=36936%2E1203867%2EqK0WJq)**
Abbott thinks he can intimidate us into silence. Let’s show him Texans don’t back down.
In solidarity,
Greg Casar

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250817-36936-footer&t=2&refcode2=36936_1203867_qK0WJq&akid=36936%2E1203867%2EqK0WJq)**

Hi there, null, it’s Haley Stevens. This month I’ve been traveling across the state, meeting incredible Michiganders – every one of them has reminded me why I’m in this race: to fight for working people, lower costs, protect Michigan jobs, and stand up to Trump’s chaos agenda.
But here’s the truth: None of that will happen if we don’t all get out and VOTE. That’s why I’m asking: **[Will you take five seconds and pledge to vote in 2026?](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/4769?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=614%2E49239%2EYReROD)**

**We can win this race.** Polling shows I’m the best Democrat to beat MAGA Mike Rogers – but we need every grassroots supporter to commit to voting in 2026. And it starts with you, null.

name: Congressman Bennie Thompson
subject: Zoe Lofgren is a fighter, and we need her in Congress.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
We need to stand up to Trump’s lies.| |
---
| | Dear Peter – it’s Congressman Bennie Thompson.
---
| | I was proud to serve on the January 6th Committee with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren.

After the violent attacks on the Capitol, our Committee worked diligently to uncover the threats to our democracy and deliver justice.

Since that day, Donald Trump has never stopped undermining the rule of law, degrading our democracy, eroding our Constitution, or lying about the work of our Committee.

In the face of Trump’s lawless contempt for our justice system and our democracy, Zoe Lofgren has led the resistance, fighting to uphold our Constitution and stop Republicans’ far-right policies.

__[_**Peter, will you join me in supporting Zoe’s re-election campaign by making a donation today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113497636/563969255/-1467160713?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2025-08-17_J6C_BEN_ES-29678_RS&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGI3ZjE1ZC05YzdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zHclkjz5UvsuOS1ZlEqgKXrkzJWXkqus_i-5DGMTmVc=)

Trump is a criminal who is determined to undermine our democracy — from attempting to overturn the results of the 2020 election, to pardoning January 6th, 2021 rioters, to threatening to jail Zoe and me along with the other former members of our Select Committee.

Now, Trump’s Justice Department hired a January 6th rioter who encouraged the murder of police officers.

**This is an insult to every honorable law enforcement officer in our country, and to our democracy itself.**

Zoe and I are outraged, but this follows the same dishonorable playbook Trump has followed his entire time in office — so the fight continues.

name: Ashley Floyd, Emerge
subject: Did you see A’shanti’s invitation for 8/18?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge
body:
Did you see A’shanti’s invitation for our Emerge-ncy Update event tomorrow? We hope you will join us for an important virtual update on Texas’ redistricting tomorrow, August 18th at 12pm PT/3pm ET with Emerge alums. Additional speaker information can be found below and we hope you can join us. RSVP here [https://secure.everyaction.com/I7yhlUgb8EyZ-K6Z6pFu_w2?contactdata=A5Ulp1l2urOSxWPqXW7BlyQxOsTxFvAItblJKcGuhelapW44X4nY9srk12AItxvH2QLd0LbyA/zdXG0QvlTo+9WQerVHm+Wn1YgRy1L4V3RfIoQPH5she0kZAUn/rzYAiW5pvqK6J1LMrIDlkcvh78eCYuk2V+9PoV9OHiLtzWA=] to secure your spot for this important conversation.
Ashley Floyd
Senior Development Director
emergeamerica.org [emergeamerica.org]
Peter,
Join me on Monday, August 18th at 12pm PT/3pm ET for an “Emerge-ncy Update” virtual event on Texas’ redistricting. I will be joined by Emerge alums Texas Democratic State Rep. Rhetta Bowers , who broke quorum in Texas, and Sen. Molly Cook , who are fighting back. I will also be joined by Emerge alum DNC Vice Chair Shasti Conrad to deliver a strategy update on preserving democracy and Emerge Texas Executive Director Becca DeFelice to discuss Emerge’s work right now.
RSVP here to join us for this important conversation [https://secure.everyaction.com/I7yhlUgb8EyZ-K6Z6pFu_w2] and spread the word to others who may be interested in joining us.

name: Byron Donalds
subject: Make Our Nation’s Capital Safe Again
body:
I took decisive action against the Left

---
| | | | | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0ij/?__vbtrk=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| | | | | The radical-left is going ballistic after I stood with President Trump YET AGAIN.

Our nation's capital used to be **[BEAUTIFUL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0ij/?__vbtrk=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "BEAUTIFUL")** \- but thanks to radical-left leadership, everything has gone down the drain.

Just like every blue city, violent crime is skyrocketing in DC, and **dangerous CRIMINALS** run rampant in the streets thanks to soft-on-crime laws.

But today, _I’m taking decisive action to make our Capitol Safe Again_ , and the attacks against me from the Left have been horrendous.
---
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0ij/?__vbtrk=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
They’re already labeling me and President Trump “ _fascists_ ” for demanding ORDER be restored.
_Calling Trump a “King” that needs to be “removed from the throne”._ _And labeling you, me, and every MAGA Patriot a “threat to Democracy”_
But you want to hear the scariest part about all of this?
**Democrats have never been in a better position to RETAKE the GOP Majority in Congress. **
They’re fundraising millions of dollars from the radical-left mob, promising to reverse ALL of the work I’m doing for our country and the MAGA Movement, and IMPEACH Trump.

I need to hear from you ASAP - are you still supporting the FANTASTIC work of _**[President Trump and the GOP Majority?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0ij/?__vbtrk=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "President Trump and the GOP Majority?")**_
---
| | [STAND WITH MAGA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0ij/?__vbtrk=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
I’ve only made it this far because of _**you and MAGA**_.

But the momentum I’m seeing from the Democrats can’t be ignored.

So please - will you stand with MAGA today and consider chipping in a few dollars to support my efforts?
---
| | [STAND WITH MAGA](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0ij/?__vbtrk=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---

Thank you, and God Bless America,

---
| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0ij/?__vbtrk=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
|
---

Bonita Springs, FL 34135 | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b0ik/?__vbtrk=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzExOTU2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: EMILYs List
subject: [HOUSE POLL] IA-01
body:
We need to keep up the momentum |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113497798/563969852/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE833_20250817_BoDiveRS_PL&sourceid=1056829&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI3ZjE1ZC05YzdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JKdXYdcqK09GB26-T64yfIZGMLYyDTAHGIQvirR1Cc=) This is big, Peter.

An early House poll shows pro-choice champion **Christina Bohannan** leading Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks by FOUR points in Iowa's 1st Congressional District.

Plus, only 32% of voters approved of Miller-Meeks' record.

Voters are turning on Republican leaders who aren't fighting for them, and we need to keep up the momentum. ****[**Donate now to help Democratic pro-choice women like Christina flip seats and take back the House:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113497801/563969855/-877057620?refcode=WUEFE833_20250817_BoDiveRS_PL&sourceid=1056829&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI3ZjE1ZC05YzdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JKdXYdcqK09GB26-T64yfIZGMLYyDTAHGIQvirR1Cc=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/113497803/563969859/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE833_20250817_BoDiveRS_PL&sourceid=1056829&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI3ZjE1ZC05YzdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_JKdXYdcqK09GB26-T64yfIZGMLYyDTAHGIQvirR1Cc=)
---
How's this for a statistic: Last cycle, Miller-Meeks won reelection by fewer than 800 votes. The GOP _flooded_ IA-01 with millions in cash because they knew how close this race would be.

This year, Rep. Miller-Meeks voted to strip health care from 603,000 Iowans when she voted for Trump's budget bill. That's right: She won by fewer than 800 votes, but is willing to leave _hundreds of thousands of her fellow Iowans_ out to dry when it comes to their health. Unsurprisingly, this seat has been rated a TOSS-UP this cycle — and it will be one of the most important seats at play in the 2026 fight for the House majority.

It's time we send extremists like Mariannette Miller-Meeks packing, Peter.

clean_body: We need to keep up the momentum | = This is big, Peter. An early House poll shows pro-choice champion Christina Bohannan leading Rep. Mariannette Miller-Meeks by FOUR points in Iowa's 1st Congressional District. Plus, only 32% of voters approved of Miller-Meeks' record. Voters are turning on Republican leaders who aren't fighting for them, and we need to keep up the momentum. **= | = How's this for a statistic: Last cycle, Miller-Meeks won reelection by fewer than 800 votes. The GOP flooded IA-01 with millions in cash because they knew how close this race would be. This year, Rep. Miller-Meeks voted to strip health care from 603,000 Iowans when she voted for Trump's budget bill. That's right: She won by fewer than 800 votes, but is willing to leave hundreds of thousands of her fellow Iowans out to dry when it comes to their health. Unsurprisingly, this seat has been rated a TOSS-UP this cycle — and it will be one of the most important seats at play in the 2026 fight for the House majority. It's time we send extremists like Mariannette Miller-Meeks packing, Peter. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for taking a stand, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Still hoping to get your take on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Just making sure you saw my email from the other day

---
Friend — just making sure you saw my email from the other day. I'm sure your inbox is busy, so I figured I'd bump it to the top.
Hearing from people like you isn't just my favorite part of campaigning — it's key to building the strongest possible campaign and winning.

**So if you haven't already, will you take a second to let me know how I can best serve you as Colorado's next governor? Here's a custom link you can use:** **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/bennet-prioritiessurvey/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113498036/563970589/-1354634071?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&ask=5&code=jtk887-su-nd&refcode=jtk887-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTRiNDQxMS05ZDdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-xm40dkSUoweejxY1M2hCYzHa5NeEQsGiIhJ5g-NUXg=&emci=594f8328-4679-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c54b4411-9d7b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1295540)**
Thanks again,
Michael

Subject: Friend, can you share your thoughts?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113498037/563970590/-1354634071?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&ask=5&code=jtk887-su-nd&refcode=jtk887-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTRiNDQxMS05ZDdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-xm40dkSUoweejxY1M2hCYzHa5NeEQsGiIhJ5g-NUXg=&emci=594f8328-4679-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c54b4411-9d7b-f011-b481-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1295540)

Friend,

Have you ever taken a survey and felt like no one would read it?

**Well, this survey won't go unread.**

I’ve been traveling across Colorado — talking with people from all walks of life. I’ve heard a lot about what’s working and what isn’t.

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: Big corporations have their lobbyists. We have you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
One of the most frustrating parts of Trump’s second term? How big corporations bend over backward just to score another massive tax break — while working families get stuck paying the price. We believe in a different America. One where your hard work means more than a corporate lobbyist’s influence. Where every family has a fair shot, and where opportunity and justice aren’t just for the wealthy few. Senator Kirsten Gillibrand has never stopped fighting for that America. She’s standing up to corporate greed, pushing to raise wages, protect workers’ rights and build an economy that works for everyone — not just billionaires. clean_body: One of the most frustrating parts of Trump’s second term? How big corporations bend over backward just to score another massive tax break — while working families get stuck paying the price. We believe in a different America. One where your hard work means more than a corporate lobbyist’s influence. Where every family has a fair shot, and where opportunity and justice aren’t just for the wealthy few. Senator Kirsten Gillibrand has never stopped fighting for that America. She’s standing up to corporate greed, pushing to raise wages, protect workers’ rights and build an economy that works for everyone — not just billionaires. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Every time you give, you help us organize, push back against billionaires’ influence and elect more Democrats who will fight for working people. Your $10 isn’t just a donation — it’s an investment in an America that’s more equal, freer and fairer. Together, we’re going to win. | = In solidarity, Team KG for NY Economic Justice * =

Fellow Conservative,

You’ve been a part of this fight before. In fact, your past support helped put conservative firepower on the map when it mattered most.

But lately... I’ve noticed we haven’t heard from you.

I get it. It’s been a long cycle. The news is relentless. And after the big wins, it can feel like the battle’s already over.

Let me tell you that it’s not. But here's the truth: this is the moment we need our people the most—when no one’s watching. When the media’s tuned out. When the other side is quietly laying groundwork and stockpiling cash.

And right now, we’re hitting a wall. Donations are slowing. Momentum is softening. And I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t thinking about the people who helped us before. That includes you, Fellow Conservative.

So here’s what I’m asking:

Really, consider your donation a signal to me and the team that you’re still here, that you still believe this fight is worth it, and that you haven’t tuned out. We can’t win this with half our team watching from the sidelines. And the truth is: I’m asking you to come back. Even just a little. Especially now. For America, Ted Cruz U.S. Senator - Texas | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265

They’re trying to steal Texas — and they're willing to throw Democrats in jail to do it.
Before you read any further, here’s what we need from you:
👉PLEASE rush an EMERGENCY DONATION to help fight back against Trump and Abbott's rigged redistricting scheme [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-abbott?refcode=081725_2]
Donald Trump has already shattered countless democratic norms on the national stage - now he’s setting his sights on Texas.
Trump is personally pressuring Texas Republicans to redraw congressional maps in his favor — wiping out Democratic gains and securing GOP control before voters ever cast a ballot.
But Democrats in Texas aren’t going down without a fight.
In a dramatic effort to stop this scheme, Democratic lawmakers fled the state to block a vote on Trump and Abbott’s redistricting plan.
And how did Governor Greg Abbott respond?
He threatened to ARREST them for defending democracy!!!!
This is what authoritarianism looks like. This is what we’re up against.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
These fights are deeply personal to me.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=1875%2E582294%2EU47lbJ)
I’m going to share more about why I’m running for U.S. Senate, but if you’re already on board, [**please chip in $5 now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250817_2_why?refcode=em20250817-1875&amount=5&refcode2=1875_582294_U47lbJ&akid=1875%2E582294%2EU47lbJ)
I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one.
Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire.
[**Can I count on you to back my campaign with a $5 contribution right now? We can’t win this race without major grassroots support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250817_2_why?refcode=em20250817-1875&amount=5&refcode2=1875_582294_U47lbJ&akid=1875%2E582294%2EU47lbJ)
**These fights are deeply personal to me.** My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away — and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn.
I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. **If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history** — a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality.
I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners _(my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant — seriously!)._ I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. **These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone.**
My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. **Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue.**
We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead — not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight?
[**If you’re with me, let’s make a powerful statement together and prove that we’re ready to win this race. Show your support with a $5 donation now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250817_2_why?refcode=em20250817-1875&amount=5&refcode2=1875_582294_U47lbJ&akid=1875%2E582294%2EU47lbJ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250817_2_why?amount=5&refcode=em20250817-1875&refcode2=1875_582294_U47lbJ&akid=1875%2E582294%2EU47lbJ)**
With gratitude,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250817-2?t=2&refcode2=1875_582294_U47lbJ&akid=1875%2E582294%2EU47lbJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=1875%2E582294%2EU47lbJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=4&akid=1875%2E582294%2EU47lbJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1875%2E582294%2EU47lbJ)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate

PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

I’m going to share more about why I’m running for U.S. Senate, but if you’re already on board, I’m running for Senate because at this pivotal moment, our economy, our democracy, and our way of life are on the line. New Hampshire deserves a Senator who is grounded in the people, places, and values of this state – and one who is ready to lead on day one. Our country is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make now will have generational impacts. You can count on me to continue taking on big fights and to confront the Trump Administration, self-dealing billionaires, and extreme politicians who are threatening our future and our ability to get things done for New Hampshire. These fights are deeply personal to me. My family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in Manchester 108 years ago, a small business that remains at the heart of the community today. Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others, but the opportunity that my ancestors and so many others like them sought has never been further away — and the Trump Administration is too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m also openly gay and happily married to my husband, Vann. With the current wave of hateful policies leveled at the LGBTQ+ community, I know how important representation is at this moment. If elected, I’d be the first openly gay male U.S. Senator in history — a badge of honor I’d wear proudly as I advocate for full equality. I am the proud product of public education, and I come from a family of business owners (my grandfather invented the chicken tender at the restaurant — seriously!). I understand firsthand the need to support neighborhood schools and small businesses in our community. These are the lifeblood of our economy and the pillars of opportunity for everyone. My life experiences are what led me to successfully run for four terms in Congress and win in one of the “swingiest” districts in the nation. Before I won my election in 2018, no one had managed to hold the seat for more than one term for more than a decade. I’m no stranger to tough electoral fights. Now I’m ready to take on the fight to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat blue. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines of the big fights ahead — not with so much at stake, from the rising costs debilitating working families to the threats to the future of our democracy. We’ve taken on big fights together in Congress. Now it’s time to win this critical Senate seat so we can keep standing up to the Trump Administration and the self-dealing billionaires threatening our future. Can I count on you to join the fight? With gratitude, Chris New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

**Friend,**

Crooked Nancy Pelosi, and her very “interesting” husband, beat every Hedge Fund in 2024. In other words, these two very average “minds” beat ALL of the Super Geniuses on Wall Street, thousands of them. It’s all INSIDE INFORMATION! Is anybody looking into this??? She is a disgusting degenerate, who Impeached me twice, on NO GROUNDS, and LOST! How are you feeling now, Nancy???
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

I’m proud to be the President for the workers, not the outsourcers and insiders; the President who stands up for Main Street, not Wall Street; who protects the hardworking middle class, not the elitist political class.

You’ve seen the disgusting attacks I’ve endured at the hands of these nasty, miserable insiders and the fake news media which is run and managed (poorly) by the Democrats.

**They have NO DESIRE to see America succeed. They have NO DESIRE to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN.**

In the first 200 days of my second term - we’ve seen the stock market soar to all time highs while bringing back BILLIONS in tariff revenue from countries our previous “leaders” sold us out for decades in the name of “globalism.”

**These are the same radical left socialists that wouldn’t hesitate to take the shirt straight off the back of an American taxpayer to clothe a criminal ILLEGAL ALIEN!**

And luckily, thanks to yours truly (me), they are quickly running out of illegal aliens to do this for!

But rest assured, the DC insiders and crooked career politicians like Nancy Pelosi and cryin’ Chuck Schumer are going to do everything they possibly can to hit the RESET button on every single thing we achieve.

**That’s why it is SO VERY IMPORTANT we never give them control of the House or Senate in these upcoming midterms.**
[SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
America is FINALLY winning AGAIN.

America is GREAT AGAIN.

And that is all because of what you, the American worker, and the American patriot, have done for our movement since its founding.

**There is no greater power in American politics than what we have built thus far, and that’s why I’m hoping to count on your support today.**
[SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Together, we will FIGHT, FIGHT, FIGHT to ensure the left never regains a majority in Washington.

And we will NEVER SURRENDER!

THANK YOU FOR YOUR ATTENTION TO THIS MATTER!

-President Donald J. Trump

subject: have you seen this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jonathan Nez for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors.

As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.

In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.

Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/PlKQ2I4wZzmk4Yj4K-J89Q~~/AAPPABA~/BqiE2J8904RQNRIQbtXTcytf8-JO7dHxD3FJw9JpqNLkCkOux2TuoQrcuhXDYYIWSKZVO0y02JiWnpHrT2MSVFTHs7i2RTNoKE4LqFxW8qn8iKUP0W4ImHwmQFfl85pNxGp9kTPLOQbVlxAfViOfUw~~

Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona.

I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.

I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please chip in anything you can today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/FWmoMGCqkVNS9g_ngSh6sg~~/AAPPABA~/a1PvrQwGIXhk7e7ydr-Ze-pDqEdY7vLHuMitZbI9dSKYbCYD0coRBUWnuOBc42GfxABarOtUOaNhMUeUIUnssuh0vYyooGR2KaCD7tTNNvZdXZd8YD-qQzCkHb69vo_mNVtQ_jXoLGC5ahC_T15DjFsEfee20-tJ2aLpjfBZrqjJRx5VBWj0LedOunj40CtsDDjbtqiyjrYF6efGXg4daw~~

We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.

As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. clean_body: Hi Peter, Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors. As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district. In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House. Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? ~~ If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. DONATE $10 NOW » DONATE $25 NOW » DONATE $50 NOW » DONATE $100 NOW » DONATE $250 NOW » OTHER » Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona. I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. This effort will open doors across the state and level the playing field, giving small businesses the opportunity to grow for decades to come.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113499671/563975876/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081725_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDMxMWFjYy1hOTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I8QJ82ELRWNQeFd0ipFzl8DksU8deQJsTIwmfpZMR3E=) If you already know the stakes of this race — and you’re ready to fight — please use this link to split a contribution between my re-election campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd_dpg_em_ossoff](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113499674/563975878/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081725_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDMxMWFjYy1hOTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I8QJ82ELRWNQeFd0ipFzl8DksU8deQJsTIwmfpZMR3E=) Otherwise, here’s why your support is so important to my campaign, especially today. This new wave of attack ads is only just the beginning, Peter. In the months ahead, Republicans are going to spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book to defeat me. Because if they win here in Georgia, they don’t just expand their Senate majority — _they lock it in for the long-term._ With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law. So all eyes are on our race here in Georgia — and the entire country is counting on us, not only to hold the line, but also to send a clear message: Americans won’t stand by while this administration dismantles Medicaid, and defunds hospitals and nursing homes. We won’t stand down while they violate fundamental human and civil rights. And we won’t be silent as Trump launches a power grab unprecedented in our history. I will fight, and I _will_ win. But I can’t do it alone. [So please, split a donation of $10 — or whatever you are in a place to give — between my re-election campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me fight back against these attacks and defend this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113499675/563975881/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081725_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDMxMWFjYy1hOTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I8QJ82ELRWNQeFd0ipFzl8DksU8deQJsTIwmfpZMR3E=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/113499676/563975883/-1341868506?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_081725_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDMxMWFjYy1hOTdiLWYwMTEtYjQ4MS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I8QJ82ELRWNQeFd0ipFzl8DksU8deQJsTIwmfpZMR3E=)**

| Trump’s own senior advisor just accused him of being involved with America’s worst child predator and using his power to cover up his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, friend. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: What I said years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250817-743&t=1001&akid=753%2E251025%2EKD2L8t ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250817-743&t=1002&akid=753%2E251025%2EKD2L8t ]Abdul for US Senate

Years ago, I said something that people weren’t ready to hear:

Donald Trump is not the disease in our politics. He’s just the worst
symptom of a much deeper disease.

Peter, I’m
talking about the way huge corporations buy and sell access to politicians
so they can rig the system against us.

Their greed means that we get less and less for what we give — and pay
more for what they sell.

It happens in healthcare, when you spend thousands on insurance that
doesn’t cover your basic needs.

It happens when you pay for groceries, and the same box of cereal now
costs more and has less food in it.

It happens when you look for housing, and real estate monopolies jack up
prices year after year.

This inequality has created a level of pain that Donald Trump and his
allies know how to weaponize.

If we’re serious about fighting back, which we absolutely are, we have to
remember what we’re fighting for.

We’re working to cure a broken system where corporate greed poisons our
democracy, drains our wallets, and sells our future to the highest bidder.

Every door we knock, every conversation we have, and every ad we run is
part of that treatment. And right now, we need the resources to keep
going. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250817-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250817-743&refcode2=753_251025_KD2L8t&akid=753%2E251025%2EKD2L8t ]If you believe in curing this disease at its root, chip in
$10 or whatever you can today.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250817-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250817-743&refcode2=753_251025_KD2L8t&akid=753%2E251025%2EKD2L8t ]Donate $10 ››

In solidarity,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=753%2E251025%2EKD2L8t
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=753%2E251025%2EKD2L8t

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: Research Team [VAP]
subject: Should we be doing more to protect election workers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Friend : U.S. Senator Amy Klobuchar introduced and is working hard to pass the Election Worker Protection Act , which would would " provide states with the resources to recruit and train election workers and ensure these workers’ safety, while also instituting federal safeguards to shield election workers from intimidation and threats ". The bill includes provisions that were developed with input from election officials across the country.
We want to see how our members feel about this legislation. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you think we need to do more to protect our election workers?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=081725_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=081725_1no&amount=15]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081725_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=081725_1&amount=20]

**Option 1:** We do nothing and allow MAGA Republicans to gut a critical public service that is critical to democracy.

clean_body: Peter, the USPS is under attack. Add your name now >> | | There are two clear possibilities here: Option 1: We do nothing and allow MAGA Republicans to gut a critical public service that is critical to democracy. Option 2: We fight back to protect USPS offices, postal workers, and the millions of Americans who rely on the USPS to mail-in vote, receive medication, and pay critical bills. House Democrats are demanding answers and pushing legislation to protect the USPS from partisan sabotage. But we need a surge of grassroots support to show the American people are watching and ready to fight! — Democracy on the Line | | Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC (www.democracyonthelinepac.com) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 122 C Street NW, Suite 360, Washington, DC 20001 Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and protect our fragile Democracy, make a=.

name: Troy Downing
subject: Football and big wins for America. Who’s got it better than us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’m NOT tired of winning. Are you?

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgxN19HQS1SVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODk4MTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MTdfR0EtUlYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg5ODEwLTI4OTkifQ/Ood-EhkeO8dCMz-xf94kTQ)Hey Peter,
It’s football season again in America, and I couldn’t be more excited.
When I’m in the stands this fall with my family — hotdog in hand, anthem in the air — I’ll be soaking in just how amazing this country is.
I was just a kid born to a single mom in a small town.
**I never thought I'd end up a teacher, then lead a tech start-up, then fly combat rescue helicopters, before eventually becoming a MAGA Republican in Congress.**
_It hasn't been easy. But it's been worth it thanks to _people like you_. _
**This summer, we saw:** 🟢 The lowest illegal immigration numbers in years.
🟢 The first June budget surplus in two decades.🟢 And a renewed belief that America’s comeback is real.President Trump lit up the scoreboard, and I’m here to make sure we don’t fumble the momentum.

This fall, as we kick off a new season for America, I’m asking for your help.
[If you share my gratitude for this country, would you consider supporting my campaign to help advance the Trump agenda down the field?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgxN19HQS1SVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODk4MTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MTdfR0EtUlYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg5ODEwLTI4OTkifQ/Y46fbMfhZyCvOSnvrk2fig)[KEEP THE DRIVE ALIVE
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDgxN19HQS1SVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE2ODk4MTAtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA4MTdfR0EtUlYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjg5ODEwLTI4OTkifQ/cdpeCIxk4qP9aOXpC7vf1Q)Thank you for being part of my team.

Best,
Troy Downing| |
