Each One Helps Us Back Another Independent Creator With A Soundcheck Fund Award, Protecting Our Democracy. We Need You.**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.N5P5MczSmj2oI_kc2mp1z1KR5GIzlA_jdM8phc63h_Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171207700)
**CLIFF 'S NOTE: **_Today we have a guest column by one of the great journalists, Brian Karem. Subscribe to his podcast podcast/substack "[Just Ask The Question,](https://substack.com/redirect/496cd5ae-cfd6-4e0e-abe9-78118766f0f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" and "[Reporter's Notebook](https://substack.com/redirect/474afa93-2c76-493f-b144-b8ceb7340f3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."_
* * *
**by Brian Karem**
European leaders are headed to the United States to help Humpty Trumpty put himself together again.
President Donald Trump's latest self-inflicted wounds occurred after he invited Vladimir Putin to Alaska to try and end the war in Ukraine; a war Trump promised he would end "Day One" of his new administration.
So, what happened?
Trump applauded a war criminal.
He stood with Putin in front of American fighter jets - the very same jets that on occasion escort Russian bombers back to Russia when they "inadvertently" stray into American air space.
He met Putin and shook his hand with smiles and cameras rolling on the Red carpet as if it were a Hollywood opening night.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3b39f125-ee76-4060-a5e5-c22afbec3ef5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump entered the summit hoping to get a ceasefire. He left without one.
There will be no immediate ceasefire.
There won't be a ceasefire.
Russia wants to keep the territory it has stolen. Putin really likes the Donbas region. It's heavily industrialized and noted for its steel and coal production.
Putin the long playing Russian, met Trump the American short-stroke master.
**It says something** **that Trump 's own people were so concerned with the meeting they wouldn't let Trump meet with Putin by himself.**
If we're lucky our children will survive and build a better world.
While Putin might be playing his idea of a long game, he cannot see beyond his own existence and neither can Trump. It is, however, still worth noting that no other President, even the so-called "demented Joe Biden" ever got played like Trump got played by Putin this week.
Donny entered with a bluster, [telling reporters](https://substack.com/redirect/0658b132-fe34-4d9a-9503-d6ab84663866?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Putin's recent bombing raids prior to the Summit weren't the negotiation tool Putin thought it was. "He's a smart guy. Been doing this a long time, but so have I," Trump told us.
Been doing what? No. Seriously. What? Apparently Trump wasn't talking about making deals, diplomacy, politics or anything resembling public service. Putin took him to town.
Trump said he wanted to see a cease fire rapidly. "I'd like to see it today," he said, though he admitted that unlikely. He also said he wanted the killing to stop. "They lost 7,011 people last week. It's crazy," the President said.
On only two issues do I believe Trump speaks the truth. One of those is his anti-war stance. "War is stupid," Trump has said often. On that the man is not wrong. How he handles the issue stinks, but not the sentiment.
Trump's head is full of misfiring and disconnected neurons. He's like a 46 Packard, once shiny and new and ready to roar. Now; rusted out, chipped and faded paint; an engine that belches out a stench as its motor misfires because of a dashboard and engine full of ancient circuits, shorted and frayed.
"They're not doing business with us until we get the war settled," Trump said. "We have the hottest economy," he adds that phrase at the end of nearly every sentence. It's one of his favorite ways to punctuate statements about anything from immigration to redesigning the White House.
> And since I get the Big Beautiful ICE to enforce our laws, we have the hottest economy." Or, "And when I got here Biden had destroyed the United States. I literally built it out of mud. And I'm calling in the National Guard. Joe Biden created crazed drug gangs, cartels, bedwetters, violent, the most violent immigrant criminals.
> He encouraged blood thirsty criminals, roving mobs of wild youths, drugged out maniacs and worse . . . homeless people who rampage through the city streets. Now? We have the hottest economy. People are calling me up all the time wanting to make deals.
Trump went to Alaska saying Putin wanted a piece of the economic powerhouse that is the United States and it was an effective bargaining tool, while all Putin had to bargain with was launching drones.
"I think they're trying to negotiate. In his mind that helps him make a better deal if they can continue the killing. He thinks that gives him strength in negotiating, but I think it weakens him." Trump said land swaps were up to Ukraine and he wasn't there to negotiate for Ukraine.
But all that came to an end when Vlad the Impaler came to Alaska to meet Donny. He climbed into Trump's private limousine, to speak semi-privately. Then after three hours of negotiations, Putin cut-off Trump, took the first lectern in the press briefing and ditched protocol to speak. The Host usually speaks first, but not on Friday.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f08f438a-8074-43ec-a3e3-ec7bfed3f1f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### _**Please Consider A[ Paid Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/7b70718e-ecd6-426b-88bc-c24da2e2621b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Each One Helps Us Back Another Independent Creator With A Soundcheck Fund Award, Protecting Our Democracy. We Need You.**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.N5P5MczSmj2oI_kc2mp1z1KR5GIzlA_jdM8phc63h_Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=171207700)
Putin's four minute introductory remarks in Alaska sounded as if he were preparing to make Alaska his next land grab. Trump got played. All Putin had to say was the he believed Trump won the 2020 election.
Truth is, Putin? He couldn't care less. If that's all it cost to buy Trump, Putin figures he got off cheap. Trump thinks he won. His minions shout faithfully for their lord and savior Trump and the new medieval age continues.
Oligarchs. Serfs and AI - oh my.
The long game will swallow Trump, Putin and all of us eventually. What happens when they're gone. If either man believes himself to be the best humanity has to offer the world, who cares? A single-man system ultimately fails.
The only system that has ever come close to team-building is democracy. Democracies, however, have to be populated by educated voters to work. Since George W. Bush introduced us to "No Child Left Behind" every child has been left behind.
Vetted factual information, solid use of the scientific method, appreciation and support for the arts, education, equality, civil rights and due process have been sacrificed at the altar of politics. _Donald Trump is the product of 40 years of declining expectations._
Trump bows to Putin. Ergo, the United States is being played by the worst incarnation of Russia since the . . . last worst incarnation of Russia.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5fb38b1f-9136-4e9e-9ec7-f4f8c20af8f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If history shows us anything, a civilization that doesn't improve itself soon ceases to exist. Democracy isn't the destination. Democracy is the road that leads to liberty. If we stop to go back, we'll never go forward. Anybody getting the point?
Progress doesn't stop. It isn't debatable. It's a fact. Change is inevitable, but progress, adaptability, are the tools best used to insure a continued human culture.
All that is debatable is the rate of change. Go slower if you wish, but go forward you must.
Sharks die when they stop swimming. Cultures die in much the same way. What we have here is a dead shark. Read that last sentence in Woody Allen's voice to further understand. The only question is who is Annie and who is Alvy?
The world right now is rudderless, though Putin would have you believe otherwise, and because of thousands of warheads that require a suntan lotion SPF level of 10 million to survive, it is exceedingly dangerous. We live in a country where nearly daily mass shootings occur.
The richest people on the planet have survival bunkers, the world's climate is headed into the toilet, there is no more rock n' roll - well some of us are still playing (_CS Note_ : amen!) - and going to McDonald's for fast food costs more than I used to spend on a date at an expensive restaurant when I was my youngest son's age.
My five year old grandson faces a world with diminished expectations, fewer options and world that will be dominated by AI.
Every president in my lifetime, with the exception of Kennedy, have significantly contributed to the dilemma. But that's democracy. A group effort. Still, a team effort, as poor as that effort is, is far superior than one person who thinks they and only they represents the system.
All such constructs are anti-humanity. And what does it teach our offspring? What does it teach our technological offspring? AI will simply be the best or worst of us all.
We can still decide. As we can still decide how to dispense with the current ethical, legal, social and political dilemmas we currently face.
In the meantime, Donald Trump is meeting with European leaders at the White House, Monday. Trump had threatened "severe" consequences for Russia if Putin didn't end the fighting.
Now he'll be talking to Ukraine's Volodymyr Zelensky along with what amounts to a NATO Summit trying to sell Zelensky on giving up the Donbas. The last time Zelensky was at the White House he was asked to leave.
Where this ends, no one can tell, but chaos will remain as long as Trump does.
The 2026 midterm elections are the next political battlefield. We have to make sure it is not the last political battle.
We all have to be convinced it is conducted fairly. We all have to have eyes on the process. We all have to respect access by eligible voters. We all have to accept the results.
These should be simple matters. We pioneered this effort. We, more than any other country, respected this effort.
The thing the rest of the world has envied about the United States is its uninterrupted example of peaceful transfer of power since our very first election. That's what Putin can't stand. He's jealous of it to the point that he has to tear it down - plus he really does want to rule the world.
The American people cannot blame each other about our political predicament. We're all responsible. That's right, in a Democracy everyone is responsible.
So, instead of blaming each other, figure out a way to do better. Seriously.
It's as easy as high school football - eleven people working together as a team has the best chance of winning. Imagine if eight billion people could pull that off. I'm on team humanity. Sign me up. Let's make it better.
Naive you say? Why I scoff. Simpleton. Ignorant. I'll accept them all. But give me this; what better goal is there?
Our science shows us a universe of endless possibilities and our fear keeps us from exploring it. Screw that. I've had Donald Trump as a president. I fought that bastard in the East Room, Rose Garden, briefing room, rope line, and assorted appearances.
_Man, at this point I ain 't afraid of any of that shit._
And I do agree with Trump that "war is stupid." But Donny is more so and the events in Alaska highlight the fact that every time Trump meets with Putin he comes away looking small.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/635d435b-1c30-47b4-bf70-1f08c1b5628a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That doesn't bode well for the U.S. or the rest of the world.
So, show all the fighter jets you want. Roll out the red carpet. Shake his hand, laugh with him and let him jump in the limo.
Putin doesn't care. He won't stop the war in Ukraine until he dies in office of a weird disease or Ukraine gives in.
It's that simple.

name: Jon Ossoff for U.S Senate
subject: MAGA’s #1 target
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
**Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Trump won.**
_That makes him MAGA’s #1 target._
Republicans are committed to eliminating Democratic seats in Congress so Trump can continue his “revolution” without domestic opposition.
They will come after Jon with hundreds of millions of dollars and every lie and dirty trick in the book.
We will fight, and together we will win.
But Jon _needs_ our help.
**[Please, chip in $5 or whatever you can today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250817-1-f&t=1&akid=643%2E5691347%2Ea704o_)
Thank you,
Team Ossoff
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250817-1-f&t=2&akid=643%2E5691347%2Ea704o_)**

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=643%2E5691347%2Ea704o_) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=643%2E5691347%2Ea704o_) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

name: Scott Presler
subject: Voter Registration Sponsors Needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://link
body:
We are making massive gains
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e20674268/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZEJ5emNERHByUQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsRFpRU3I5TQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNuekJTS0ROU3hieWVscw/gaKJWtQ/senb0c416e4)
| | | |
---
Dear Patriot,
It’s Scott Presler, writing to you from the front lines of Pennsylvania and New Jersey, where my team at Early Vote Action is rewriting the political map.
Thanks to our voter registration staff, we’ve slashed Pennsylvania’s Democratic voter lead by over 300,000 since 2020, flipping counties like Bucks and Luzerne red for President Trump in 2024. In New Jersey, we’ve cut the Dems’ advantage from over 1 million to just 834,000 - and we’re not stopping there.
**_But here’s the deal: our voter registration staff - real patriots hitting gun shows, farmers’ markets, and VFW halls - are running on fumes._**
Democrats are fighting back, pouring money into their machine to hold their ground. To keep registering new Republicans for New Jersey’s 2025 gubernatorial race and Pennsylvania’s 2026 elections,**_[we need your help to fund our staff](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e20674268/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtdnJzX3JzXzIwMjUwODA1Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsRFpRU3I5TQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExNTNfd3Iy/gaKJWtQ/s0vfc9af6d8)_.**
**Can you sponsor a voter registration staffer today?**
Just $15 covers an hour of their work - knocking doors, signing up truckers, veterans, and hunters to secure a red wave. Every new voter we register is a step toward flipping these states for good.

[SPONSOR A VOTER REGISTRATION STAFFER](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e20674268/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9lYXJseS12b3RlL2V2YV9kb25fb21fZXJfc3AtdnJzX3JzXzIwMjUwODA1Lw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MTc/LbmNsRFpRU3I5TQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjExNTNfd3Iy/gaKJWtQ/s0vfc9af6d8)
We’re not just talking about change - we’re making it happen.
In Pennsylvania, we flipped Bucks County from a 15,000-voter Democratic lead to a 2,000-voter Republican edge.
In New Jersey, we’ve added 145,611 new GOP voters since 2021.
Patriot, your support keeps this momentum alive.

clean_body: We are making massive gains | | | | | Dear Patriot, It’s Scott Presler, writing to you from the front lines of Pennsylvania and New Jersey, where my team at Early Vote Action is rewriting the political map. Thanks to our voter registration staff, we’ve slashed Pennsylvania’s Democratic voter lead by over 300,000 since 2020, flipping counties like Bucks and Luzerne red for President Trump in 2024. In New Jersey, we’ve cut the Dems’ advantage from over 1 million to just 834,000 - and we’re not stopping there. But here’s the deal: our voter registration staff - real patriots hitting gun shows, farmers’ markets, and VFW halls - are running on fumes. Democrats are fighting back, pouring money into their machine to hold their ground. To keep registering new Republicans for New Jersey’s 2025 gubernatorial race and Pennsylvania’s 2026 elections,. Can you sponsor a voter registration staffer today? Just $15 covers an hour of their work - knocking doors, signing up truckers, veterans, and hunters to secure a red wave. Every new voter we register is a step toward flipping these states for good. We’re not just talking about change - we’re making it happen. In Pennsylvania, we flipped Bucks County from a 15,000-voter Democratic lead to a 2,000-voter Republican edge. In New Jersey, we’ve added 145,611 new GOP voters since 2021. Patriot, your support keeps this momentum alive. Let’s make Pennsylvania the next Ohio and turn New Jersey purple in 2025. . I’d be honored to have your support, Scott Presler Founder, Early Vote Action | | | |

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: God help us if we lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
I've heard the calls to "Do Something!" And I agree.

We are going to pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California because Donald Trump cannot be allowed to steal the next election by redrawing maps in red states only.
I've heard the calls to "Do Something!" And I agree. I don’t want to go to another candlelight vigil. I don’t want to hold hands. It's time for action. Concrete action.
And God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
This is going to be a big week.
In Texas, it looks like Republicans will pass their new maps.
Here in California, our legislature will put a special election on the ballot for November where the people will vote on our maps.
They don't need a vote of the people in Texas. In California, people will vote. It will be a close election. Republicans will spend more than $100 million to beat us.
So before this week ends and a critical new one begins - I am asking one last time:
[**Please make a contribution to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. If you've given before, please give once more. If you haven't given yet, now is when I need you most. We cannot afford to lose this election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250817-2&refcode2=2462_4767699_houvVx&akid=2462%2E4767699%2EhouvVx)

Last weekend, Mike Johnson — the speaker of the House — made a bold prediction that I just couldn’t ignore:

**Mike Johnson can dream all he wants, but I have news for him: Democrats are going to take back the House — and when we do, Donald Trump’s presidency is over.**
We will uncover the lies and corruption that House Republicans have let him get away with.
We will release the Epstein files that Donald Trump is so desperately trying to cover up.
And we will conduct real oversight and investigations into the most corrupt administration in American history.
_But first, we need to prove Mike Johnson wrong and win back the House._
**[That’s why I’m personally asking you to join me in this fight by chipping in $10 or more right now. Robert

# [District Round‐up 8/17/25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F08%2F17%2Fdistrict-round-up-8-17-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=db35b5a6ebe03a5f5e294d0565ccb74f&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| | By **Elizabeth Farnham** on August 17, 2025
---|---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania's 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I've been and what issues I've tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-fa,rnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b4472f8847c0ec97cde7a86791a037026dda61ff34fb14040acf744d608f3a9e&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5039&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=3e555d2e6df220582fa7dc945d8d306a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=4026a53dbd8c33295cc1dd1cf9b7ec27)
Announcement
_You are Cordially Invited by_
**The Beth Farnham for Congress Campaign**
_to_
**An announcement by Beth Farnham for her 2026 run for
U.S. House of Representatives (PA-13)**
_
_After an introduction by Franklin County Commissioner Bob Ziobrowski,
Beth will share her vision as a member of the U.S. House of Representatives to recreate a functioning Congress, defend our Precious Democracy, and fight for Everyday Americans in addition to her established priorities. Afterwards, please enjoy some light refreshments and Democratic fellowship.
**Advance registration is required.**
_Please register for the event through this link:_
**__****[Event Registration for Beth Farnham for Congress](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2b7ec71fac13b4fa38ae548197f9d2ea54b666f486b8d99d01e37b3d0832de71&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5039&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=d0147b627f29aba343bdad84b1fa7079&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUvcGZMYTZiTlV6N3hhdkZlOUE&email_id=4026a53dbd8c33295cc1dd1cf9b7ec27)** _
_
**Saturday, August 23rd, from 11:00am - 1:00pm.**
The 11/30 Room (2nd Floor)
**Franklin County Visitors Bureau
15 South Main Street
Chambersburg, PA 17201**
(Metered Parking is available on Main Street and other streets, but there is NO parking behind the building. There is, however, a metered public parking lot just down Main Street past the Franklin County Democratic Committee headquarters.)
If you would like to donate to the Beth Farnham for Congress campaign, please donate through this link:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b4472f8847c0ec97cde7a86791a037026dda61ff34fb14040acf744d608f3a9e&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5039&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=3e555d2e6df220582fa7dc945d8d306a&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=4026a53dbd8c33295cc1dd1cf9b7ec27)
or focus your camera on the image below:
**or mail a check payable to :**
**Beth Farnham for Congress**
**P.O. Box 72**
**McSherrystown, PA 17344**
_Under federal election law individuals may contribute a maximum of $7,000 with $3,500 allocated for the primary election and $3,500 for the general election. Under federal election law PACs may contribute a maximum of $10,000 with $5,000 allocated for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Federal law also requires us to collect and report the name, mailing address, and employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle.Contributions or gifts to “Beth Farnham for Congress” are not tax-deductible for income tax purposes. Only personal, partnerships, and political action committee checks please, we are unable to accept any corporate funds._
On August 10th, I had the honor to speak at Cambria County Democratic Committee's (CCDC) new headquarters in Ebensburg. The CCDC, chaired by Nina Licastro, does great work promoting Democratic candidates and bringing together like-minded folks. Last year at their summer picnic, I even met Ken Martin who now chairs the Democratic National Party. Together, we #ChooseDemocracy and Democrats!
For a few days, my family traveled out of town, but on Friday, August 15th, I was back in the district, speaking to voters at the Perry County Fair at the table hosted by the Perry County Democratic Committee.
What's on the minds and hearts of voters at the Perry County Fair?
"It's the economy, Stupid."
Born of an incompetent and tweeted tariff policy, prices for imported consumer goods are rising considerably. For some voters, it sneaks up on them until a much higher grocery bill catches their attention. For others there are expected increases for goods, like coffee from Brazil.
As a member of Congress, I will fight for Everyday Americans by legislating a livable federal minimum wage, ensuring our social safety nets such as Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) Medicaid, Medicare, WIC, and Social Security remain stable and solvent, and push for the ultra wealthy to pay their fair share in taxes. Everyday Americans like hard working families and retirees on a fixed income shouldn't simply exist, but THRIVE. Moreover, the executive branch will be prevented from creating tariff policy by emotional social media posts.
Together, we can choose normalcy and #ChooseDemocracy .
Many thanks to Diane Bowman Shenk who took pictures of me at the fair.
On Saturday, Campaign Manager Jack Stansbury and I headed to Franklin County to their Peach Festival in Fort Loudon. It was a gorgeous, sunny day to see the immeasurable talent of local craftspeople and enjoy some local peach pie.
I petted a goat, tried some local granola , and bought a "life-changing" tomato.
If you ever feel stressed, M.A.C.C. Acres in McVeytown of Mifflin County offers "goat therapy" where you can pet small goats until all of your worries melt away.
All Things Granola of Franklin County sells cinnamon rolls and granola parfaits in addition to their selection of yummy granolas.
And Country Creek Produce, also of Franklin County, sells heirloom tomatoes in addition to other fresh produce. I look forward to trying mine.
Later, I had a chance to support the Make-A-Wish Foundation convoy as it drove through Chambersburg.
If you're like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don't just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

clean_body: | Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania's 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I've been and what issues I've tackled in the past week. Criss-crossi... | or | | | or ---|---|--- | | By Elizabeth Farnham on August 17, 2025 ---|--- Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania's 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I've been and what issues I've tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: Announcement You are Cordially Invited by The Beth Farnham for Congress Campaign to An announcement by Beth Farnham for her 2026 run for U.S. House of Representatives (PA-13) After an introduction by Franklin County Commissioner Bob Ziobrowski, Beth will share her vision as a member of the U.S. House of Representatives to recreate a functioning Congress, defend our Precious Democracy, and fight for Everyday Americans in addition to her established priorities. Afterwards, please enjoy some light refreshments and Democratic fellowship. Advance registration is required. Please register for the event through this link: Saturday, August 23rd, from 11:00am - 1:00pm. The 11/30 Room (2nd Floor) Franklin County Visitors Bureau 15 South Main Street Chambersburg, PA 17201 (Metered Parking is available on Main Street and other streets, but there is NO parking behind the building. There is, however, a metered public parking lot just down Main Street past the Franklin County Democratic Committee headquarters.) If you would like to donate to the Beth Farnham for Congress campaign, please donate through this link: or focus your camera on the image below: or mail a check payable to : Beth Farnham for Congress P.O. Box 72 McSherrystown, PA 17344 Under federal election law individuals may contribute a maximum of $7,000 with $3,500 allocated for the primary election and $3,500 for the general election. Under federal election law PACs may contribute a maximum of $10,000 with $5,000 allocated for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Federal law also requires us to collect and report the name, mailing address, and employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle.Contributions or gifts to “Beth Farnham for Congress” are not tax-deductible for income tax purposes. Only personal, partnerships, and political action committee checks please, we are unable to accept any corporate funds. On August 10th, I had the honor to speak at Cambria County Democratic Committee's (CCDC) new headquarters in Ebensburg. The CCDC, chaired by Nina Licastro, does great work promoting Democratic candidates and bringing together like-minded folks. Last year at their summer picnic, I even met Ken Martin who now chairs the Democratic National Party. Together, we #ChooseDemocracy and Democrats! For a few days, my family traveled out of town, but on Friday, August 15th, I was back in the district, speaking to voters at the Perry County Fair at the table hosted by the Perry County Democratic Committee. What's on the minds and hearts of voters at the Perry County Fair? "It's the economy, Stupid." Born of an incompetent and tweeted tariff policy, prices for imported consumer goods are rising considerably. For some voters, it sneaks up on them until a much higher grocery bill catches their attention. For others there are expected increases for goods, like coffee from Brazil. As a member of Congress, I will fight for Everyday Americans by legislating a livable federal minimum wage, ensuring our social safety nets such as Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) Medicaid, Medicare, WIC, and Social Security remain stable and solvent, and push for the ultra wealthy to pay their fair share in taxes. Everyday Americans like hard working families and retirees on a fixed income shouldn't simply exist, but THRIVE. Moreover, the executive branch will be prevented from creating tariff policy by emotional social media posts. Together, we can choose normalcy and #ChooseDemocracy . Many thanks to Diane Bowman Shenk who took pictures of me at the fair. On Saturday, Campaign Manager Jack Stansbury and I headed to Franklin County to their Peach Festival in Fort Loudon. It was a gorgeous, sunny day to see the immeasurable talent of local craftspeople and enjoy some local peach pie. I petted a goat, tried some local granola , and bought a "life-changing" tomato. If you ever feel stressed, M.A.C.C. Acres in McVeytown of Mifflin County offers "goat therapy" where you can pet small goats until all of your worries melt away. All Things Granola of Franklin County sells cinnamon rolls and granola parfaits in addition to their selection of yummy granolas. And Country Creek Produce, also of Franklin County, sells heirloom tomatoes in addition to other fresh produce. I look forward to trying mine. Later, I had a chance to support the Make-A-Wish Foundation convoy as it drove through Chambersburg. If you're like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don't just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2025. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real‐time notifications - all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110 |

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: UNH POLL -- NASHUA BOARD OF ALDERMEN MEETING – MILFORD LABOR DAY PARADE
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/unh-poll-nashua-board-of-aldermen-meeting-milford-labor-day-parade?e=c338950e03)
---
| |
---
| |
# UNIVERSITY OF NEW HAMPSHIRE POLL
NASHUA BOARD OF ALDERMEN MEETING
MILFORD LABOR DAY PARADE

**Encouraging Poll on NH02 – 2026!** Dear Supporters, The latest Granite State Poll from the University of New Hampshire paints a very encouraging picture for our campaign in the possible 2026 rematch for New Hampshire's 2nd Congressional District. While my Democrat opponent, Ms. Goodlander, and I are nearly tied in favorability (31% vs. 30%), my opponent's unfavorability numbers are higher (36% vs. 33%). These results demonstrate that with support, we can win the 2026 election! (Please see [Granite State Poll](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=46e705c465&e=c338950e03))
However, through their Washington DC connections, the Goodlander/Jake Sullivan Democrat Party political machine has significantly out-raised our campaign financially. To level the playing field and ensure the necessary resources to reach voters, your contributions are urgently needed. Every donation, no matter the size, makes a difference! Please consider making a contribution to the campaign today at: _[www.lilytangwilliams.com/congress/donate/](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=02513d3e6d&e=c338950e03)_ **Standing Up for New Hampshire: Testimony on Nongfu Spring** On August 12th, I joined many concerned Granite Staters at the Nashua Board of Aldermen meeting to address the controversial land purchase in Nashua, NH, by the Chinese company, Nongfu Spring. In my address to the Board, I highlighted the national security implications of this deal given its proximity to sensitive sites, including an FAA control center, airports, defense contractors, a Joint Base, and most importantly, our local water supply. I warned residents about the true nature and ambitions of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). You can view the first two minutes of my testimony on X (formerly Twitter) here: [https://x.com/i/status/1955777419022929928](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=79aa37f89a&e=c338950e03) This important issue also garnered coverage from WMUR, which reported on residents' concerns and interviewed me regarding the risks associated with the Chinese company's land purchase:[ NH residents voice concern after Chinese company's land purchase](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=2e89729cf3&e=c338950e03) **Join Me for the Labor Day Parade in Milford!** Let's celebrate Labor Day and Milford's 80-year tradition together! Supporters are invited to join Team Lily for the Labor Day parade. We will line up at Milford High School at 12:00 PM. The parade route is approximately 1.3 miles and will conclude at the VFW on Perkins Street. Team Lily shirts and rally signs will be provided. Please indicate if you're coming and encourage family and friends to join! (See flyer, below)

In Liberty,

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I want to hear from you directly
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=621%2E181023%2EdfmPQ4)
Hey, I hope you’re having a great summer.
Earlier this summer, our campaign did a tour of Michigan. It was called our Thrive in Michigan tour, where I sat down with voters in Ishpeming, Benton Harbor, Warren, Muskegon, and Traverse City to ask: _What’s on your mind? What's keeping you up at night?_
**[But since I can’t hear from everyone directly in person, this survey is the next best way to ensure I hear from you directly. Will you take a minute to let me know what’s on your mind?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/survey/2025-summer-survey?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=621%2E181023%2EdfmPQ4)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/survey/2025-summer-survey?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=621%2E181023%2EdfmPQ4)
---
Every single person I talked to mentioned how it's getting harder and harder to get by in Michigan.
We want a Michigan where people can thrive, where you can afford to do more than just live, but also _grow_ and ensure your family is happy, healthy, and safe. You shouldn’t have to lose sleep over whether you're gonna pay the electric bill or your grocery bill that month, but that’s the reality facing so many Michiganders.
The truth is, the middle class is shrinking. This means that far too many people are being stretched too thin and have to work multiple jobs to just eke by. I believe that the government needs to show up when you need it, save you time and money, and actually make your life easier. _And right now, people need results._
That's what I've tried to do as Secretary of State, and that's what I hope to continue doing as governor — see people’s pain, and do something about it.
**I’m in this to make our government work better for people, and it’s also why I’m asking you:[Will you take a minute to fill out this short survey? Your responses are an important part of shaping our future in Michigan, so I hope you’ll make your voice heard today.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/survey/2025-summer-survey?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=621%2E181023%2EdfmPQ4)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/survey/2025-summer-survey?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250817_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=621%2E181023%2EdfmPQ4)
---
Thank you,
Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-jbmi/?t=2&akid=621%2E181023%2EdfmPQ4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information-jbmi/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=3&akid=621%2E181023%2EdfmPQ4)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

👋 Peter, we know it's late on a Sunday, but two minutes is all we're asking for.
Here's the big news: **Donald Trump is now attacking Abigail directly.**
The President sees our momentum. It's only a matter of time until he makes a full-throated endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears and begins pouring his billion-dollar war chest into Virginia.
_And at this stage of the race, we can't let them get the upper hand._
The truth is, our campaign is powered by folks in Virginia and around the country pitching in a few bucks at a time. _We wouldn't have it any other way._
But it's going to take each of us stepping up to hit our August fundraising goal.

name: Tobias Read
subject: Audit Report: Critical investments wasted in improper payments and wasteful spending. It’s time to fix this >>
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250817em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250817em]
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I am grateful to everyone who has already signed my petition demanding stronger oversight of Oregon’s Preschool Promise program. If you haven’t yet, there’s still time — and the details below from the investigation make this even more urgent.
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B_U0FqFZyE6P2rXeXS2gdA2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250817em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250817em]
Here’s what we’ve learned:
Some providers received full funding despite serving just 1 or 2 children . In one instance, a single child received services at a site that was fully funded for 20 years.
$150,000 went to classrooms that never opened , even months after being funded.
Another program failed to submit any receipts for over a year, yet still received $1.5 million in public funds. There was no documentation to verify how the money was spent.
In total, the audit identified $1.4 million in wasteful or improper payments — enough to fund preschool for more than 100 additional kids.
This isn’t about punishing honest providers — it’s about ensuring that taxpayer dollars are used responsibly, especially when they’re meant to help families in need.
That’s why I’m asking again: Will you sign the petition and stand with me in fighting for transparency and reform? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B_U0FqFZyE6P2rXeXS2gdA2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/B_U0FqFZyE6P2rXeXS2gdA2]
Together, we can protect public dollars — and ensure they’re reaching the children and families they were meant for.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250817em]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=Ou1jx7N0AY0EEQX%2F2URtIvp3HhQmSSZx3OFneyzJZzSfA9zi9oJpHdMvdgEzA1aW1IV36cS%2FCX2C6q0Y2DpVsmgp1lxHhdB0uUPHcpPLZEdA7XPK%2Bvm7ASE1kZzs2rosx1fIQ3oOCuSaightCmz2U%2BAUOnFl3qifaZn2nBgT%2BQNTcLyG%2BZ5YUWoRQ1%2Bne0DpfCJhDI2BV8WsalsViClbAYDWVz14o3aqpYxSiXax7nhu1CiaCkCfXpu9dT%2F31Sa85luOEf314TmXIGDwigRH9pmIQqDqT6EkDAlIqala5fsodkeUiFbhYfWbOIG7BaVfNteCcUySn3yh8FYB6r0axSM8pwS%2FIBrR6gfE0r8%2BhWm3xCl2a52zvuYS5d%2BHATtZ3Ee1QSGs5QWgdgvtXML%2B6VjYJm9sspgIdbDkEMWpeNifeE2qE50Xh569DxE4D1os .

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1765%2E791427%2E9ON9Vo)

Friend — it’s Ilhan.
**[I’m humbly asking for your support tonight.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250817-1-30&t=2&akid=1765%2E791427%2E9ON9Vo)
Friend, this has never been easy.
I was raised in a refugee camp halfway across the world. Through good luck and hard work, my family came to the US and found a good life in Minnesota.
And despite that background, I became active in my community and eventually earned the privilege of serving in office.
Since then I’ve faced attacks and harassment from some of the most powerful people in the world; the President, Senators, House members, foreign leaders, oligarchs, multi-billion dollar media outlets and corporations, you name it.
I’ve dealt with the endless death threats, the insults, the people who think I’m not good enough, or not ‘from here’, and want me to hide away from public life.
**But through all of this, I’ve never backed down. Because I have you.**
This entire team and the movement we’ve built together has helped me push through and keep up the fight for our futures.
Because our progressive vision for this nation, where everyone is taken care of and provided the rights and dignity they deserve, is worth fighting for, despite it all.
So, with our August fundraising deadline quickly approaching, I’m counting on you to stand by my side, as you always have.
**[I’m humbly asking you to make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford today. It would make a huge difference.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250817-1-30&t=3&akid=1765%2E791427%2E9ON9Vo)

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Dem AGs v. Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250817&t=1001&akid=1914%2E1088799%2E3QQFBR ]Rob Bonta

Let’s talk
about attorneys general — because this work has never been more
important.

There’s more to AGs than just weird pluralization (yes, it’s “attorneys
general”). Right now, the 23 Democratic AGs across the country are the
first and last line of defense against the extreme overreach of the Trump
administration.

You might be wondering – where are all the Republican AGs in this? Ditto!
Despite the fact that people who live in red states are being harmed by
this lawless administration too, GOP AGs are nowhere to be found. The work
of protecting the rights of all Americans and holding Trump and his allies
accountable to the law comes down to Democratic attorneys general — and
we’ve got a full tank of gas to get it done.

We are blocking and stopping Trump’s unlawful, unconstitutional conduct
consistently, and we will continue to do it as long as he continues to
break the law.

But how does all of this work?

I think of Trump’s violations in two main categories:

1. When he and his administration withhold congressionally appropriated
funding — funds for things like education, transportation, and health
care that Congress has already specifically allocated. The
Constitution clearly gives Congress the power of the purse, NOT the
Oval Office.

2. When he comes after our rights and freedoms — like birthright
citizenship, the right to vote, and freedom of speech. These are
rights that no president has the power to trample over, period.

No matter how he breaks the law or violates the Constitution, we sue — and
we’ve already had major successes over the past seven months, including
blocking Trump’s unlawful actions 14 times.

It’s that simple — every time Trump breaks the law, we sue.

If he stops breaking the law, we’ll stop suing.

To those who have read this far — thank you. If you believe in this work,
and you want us to keep up these important fights against Trump’s
lawlessness, I’m asking for your help.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250817?refcode=em20250816-1914&refcode2=1914_1088799_3QQFBR&akid=1914%2E1088799%2E3QQFBR ]Will you make a donation of any amount to my re-election campaign? I’m
on the ballot next year, and we are going to need all hands on deck to win
these fights.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250817?refcode=em20250816-1914&amount=5&refcode2=1914_1088799_3QQFBR&akid=1914%2E1088799%2E3QQFBR ]Donate $5 »

I’m incredibly grateful for this team, because I wouldn’t be here fighting
for our rights and freedoms without you.

Thanks for reading.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/1022?t=1002&akid=1914%2E1088799%2E3QQFBR ][IMG]

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=1914%2E1088799%2E3QQFBR

clean_body: [ ]Rob Bonta Let’s talk about attorneys general — because this work has never been more important. There’s more to AGs than just weird pluralization (yes, it’s “attorneys general”). Right now, the 23 Democratic AGs across the country are the first and last line of defense against the extreme overreach of the Trump administration. You might be wondering – where are all the Republican AGs in this? Ditto! Despite the fact that people who live in red states are being harmed by this lawless administration too, GOP AGs are nowhere to be found. The work of protecting the rights of all Americans and holding Trump and his allies accountable to the law comes down to Democratic attorneys general — and we’ve got a full tank of gas to get it done. We are blocking and stopping Trump’s unlawful, unconstitutional conduct consistently, and we will continue to do it as long as he continues to break the law. But how does all of this work? I think of Trump’s violations in two main categories: 1. When he and his administration withhold congressionally appropriated funding — funds for things like education, transportation, and health care that Congress has already specifically allocated. The Constitution clearly gives Congress the power of the purse, NOT the Oval Office. 2. When he comes after our rights and freedoms — like birthright citizenship, the right to vote, and freedom of speech. These are rights that no president has the power to trample over, period. No matter how he breaks the law or violates the Constitution, we sue — and we’ve already had major successes over the past seven months, including blocking Trump’s unlawful actions 14 times. It’s that simple — every time Trump breaks the law, we sue. If he stops breaking the law, we’ll stop suing. To those who have read this far — thank you. If you believe in this work, and you want us to keep up these important fights against Trump’s lawlessness, I’m asking for your help. [ ]Will you make a donation of any amount to my re-election campaign? I’m on the ballot next year, and we are going to need all hands on deck to win these fights. [ ]Donate $5 » I’m incredibly grateful for this team, because I wouldn’t be here fighting for our rights and freedoms without you. Thanks for reading. [ ][IMG] Rob Bonta Attorney General of California

name: Deb Haaland
subject: This will only take a minute
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’ll keep this quick.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3863%2E400544%2EKIbaVX)
It’s getting late so I’ll keep this quick:
My team let me know that we’re still a bit short of reaching our $10,000 mid-month goal.
I’ll be frank — _we can’t afford to miss this benchmark._
This is not a safe Democratic seat. New Mexico’s governorship has historically switched parties every eight years — so we’ve got real work to do to buck the historical trend.
Trump and his MAGA billionaires know this, and they’re preparing for a fight. New Mexico is shaping up to be one of the most competitive governor’s races in the country.
**We’re relying on grassroots power to fight back.** These goals aren’t arbitrary — reaching them will determine how much we can organize, share our message, and win.
[**Can you rush in a $5 contribution before the midnight deadline to make sure we meet this goal and keep our campaign for New Mexico on track?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250817_2_mm?amount=5&refcode=em20250817-3863&refcode2=3863_400544_KIbaVX&akid=3863%2E400544%2EKIbaVX)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250817_2_mm?amount=5&refcode=em20250817-3863&refcode2=3863_400544_KIbaVX&akid=3863%2E400544%2EKIbaVX)**
Thank you,
Deb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: If everyone reading this email pitched in $3…
body:
Every dollar we raise right now serves a critical purpose:
---
Derek, With so much happening right now, you may not think that $3, $5, or $25 can make a difference in checking Trump’s power. **But you’d be wrong.** Every dollar we raise right now serves a critical purpose: laying the groundwork to take back Congress. Investing in our state parties. Holding Trump and congressional Republicans accountable in the courts, in their own districts, online, and in the media — and making sure voters are hearing that message loud and clear. We are able to do this work because thousands of grassroots supporters just like you have chipped in what they could, when they could, to support our mission. Today, we’re going to ask you to join them — but first, let us tell you why. **Here’s what our path forward looks like:** It’s clearer than ever that we need to take back Congress and elect more Democrats who will prevent Trump’s worst instincts from becoming our new reality. To win the Senate majority, we need to build strong, statewide organizing programs in at least eight states — places like Georgia, North Carolina, Maine, and New Hampshire. On top of that, we’ll need strong Democratic infrastructure in districts all over the map, to win in 35 vulnerable Republican House seats. As you can imagine, all of that will take a HUGE number of resources. **[That’s why we’re asking for a chance to earn your first contribution of 2025. If winning back Congress is important to you, can you make your first $3 contribution today to help us keep building the strongest possible Democratic Party?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250817_4325_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4325_22930333_Pf134P&akid=4325%2E22930333%2EPf134P) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250817_4325_fr&refcode2=4325_22930333_Pf134P&akid=4325%2E22930333%2EPf134P)**
---

| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_20250817_4325_fr&refcode2=4325_22930333_Pf134P&akid=4325%2E22930333%2EPf134P)**
---

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20250817_4325_fr&refcode2=4325_22930333_Pf134P&akid=4325%2E22930333%2EPf134P)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em_20250817_4325_fr&refcode2=4325_22930333_Pf134P&akid=4325%2E22930333%2EPf134P)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250817_4325_fr&refcode2=4325_22930333_Pf134P&akid=4325%2E22930333%2EPf134P)**
---
****
Thank you for your support,
The Democrats
⛅To all Democrats: 🇺🇸
If everyone reading this email chipped in $3 right now, we’d be well on our way to building the resources we need to organize and reach voters all over the country.
But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. That’s why we’re counting on all Democrats who know how high the stakes are to step up in this moment.
[**Will you make your first contribution to the DNC today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250817_4325_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4325_22930333_Pf134P&akid=4325%2E22930333%2EPf134P)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250817_4325_fr&refcode2=4325_22930333_Pf134P&akid=4325%2E22930333%2EPf134P)**

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
